Charge up CP and land a Cross Arts to boost the stats of all your digimon. The best digimon for this fight is probably Agumon due being perfectly matched against Kuwagamon able to do 300% damage with Pepper Fire.

That said generally any Vaccine type will be effective as long as their leveled over 5.

After you defeat the boss watch the scenes and your current mission will be completed.

## Walkthrough

### Chapter 1: Time Stranger

#### The Temple of Beginnings

Once you regain control follow the dark shadow down stairs.

And then approach it. After which some scenes will play.

#### Shinjuku Park: Waterfall Plaza

When you regain control you will be back in Shinjuku.

Before approaching the strange commotion nearby go towards the north east end of the are near the vending machines you will see a glowing spot this is a hidden chest, open it to get a Talent Awakening Booster, basically it increases Talent by 2.

![](/ffaq/40/37/)

Then approach the truck for a scene. Then follow the man in glasses to the next area to the north east and speak to him. After the scenes open the door with a DigiAttack. Agree to help him.

#### Shinjuku Underground Waterway: South Block

Digimon Found  
---  
Wormon| Tapirmon  
Betamon| Biyomon  
Numemon| Muchomon  
Bukamon| Pagumon  
Nyaromon|   
  
Walk further in for a scene, then proceed further in. You will now encounter digimon here as usual. There is a red barrel ahead you can destroy (Analyze+Attack).

Follow the path south and then east, when you reach an open space go south to find a chest in a dead end with a Numemon, it contains an HP Spray.

![](/ffaq/40/38/)

Go back to the open space (remember you can destroy the barrels and crates for extra items) and follow the path north east.

When you reach another fork to north path first.

In the large room check the north west corner to find a chest, Courage Revival.

![](/ffaq/40/40/)

Go back to the fork and go east, you will see a chest in front of you under the big 2. It contains a SPI Attachment.

![](/ffaq/40/39/)

Then to the south is a damaged gate, destroy it and go through, prepare your team with Vaccine digimon with fire skills.

Now follow the path south until a scene plays.

##### Raremon

This ugly gross thing is a Champion level, Virus type. As before Vaccine types are going to be the most useful. Fire is also effective so once again using Agumon or Vaccine types with fire attacks and skills is useful.

He uses primarily Sludge to cause poison and Lunatic gate for physical damage to the entire team. He also uses Hell Crusher for a party wide dark attack.

After you do about 25% damage a scene will play.

Then just continue the fight, don't be afraid to swap out mons when necessary or use items. Overall this is a long but not difficult fight if you come prepared.

With that done we'll leave the sewers and have a few scenes answer any dialogue as you like.

#### Misono Residence and Exploring Shinjuku

After the scenes, you will find yourself freeloading at the Misono Residence, for some reason despite being 8 years in the past Operator is able to make contact with us.

You can rest at the sofa to heal your mons. When ready leave the attic.

After speaking to Inori go out the door and downstairs and enter the office.

Of course he's a detective, why am I not surprised!?

##### Shinjuku: East Shopping District

You can now explore the East Shopping district somewhat freely.

As with the park there are occasional hidden "carts" and "chests" in the real world so analyze often.

In this area you will find a shop for clothing you can put on your protagonist, though i wouldn't waste money on it now.

Across from it is a food stand which sells food items, these will be useful when you have access to the Digimon Farm.

Further south is Weekly mart where you can by healing items for battle.

Take the south exit and choose where to go next. You can go to Nishi Shinjuku or Higashi Shinjuku.

There is A LOT to explore so let's go one place at a time.

 **The Below portions is just me tracking down and showing locations of all chests in the areas currently unlocked if you want to focus on the main plot skip ahead.**

First let's go to Nishi Shinjuku, specifically the Tokyo Govt. Building Exterior.

##### Tokyo Metropolitan Government Building Exterior

Once here approach the north west area where the door symbol on the map is for a short optional scene. This is where the dungeon is for reference but we can't go in right now.

Anyway approach the Govt. Building and check the flowers to the left when facing the building, there is a chest here, it contains Friendship S, which increases Bond by 1%.

![](/ffaq/40/41/)

Now we go to Higashi Shinjuku, specifically to Seibu Shinjuku: Overbridge Intersection.

##### Seibu Shinjuku: Overbridge Intersection

Move a little bit north west towards the plants near the bikes, there is another hidden chest, it contains a Speed Augment Chip I.

![](/ffaq/40/42/)

Go north and after coming out of the tunnel look east near the trash cans is another chest, this one has a Defense Augment Chip I.

![](/ffaq/40/43/)

From here continue north and then west and then south all the way down to behind stairs going into the station near a phone booth, here you will find another chest, it contains Talent Awakening Booster.

![](/ffaq/40/44/)

Now go down the stairs next to this chest to Shijuku underground Promenade.

##### Shinjuku Underground: Promenade

Upon entering turn left (north) and find a chest next to a magazine rack, it has a Spirit Augment Chip I.

![](/ffaq/40/45/)

Now hug the south wall following it to find another chest, this one has Attack Augment Chip I.

![](/ffaq/40/46/)

Take the east exit to Shinjuku Station: East Gate.

##### Shinjuku Station: East Gate

From when you enter turn north to find a chest, it has another Talent Awakening Booster.

![](/ffaq/40/47/)

Back track to the Promenade and then take the north exit to Shinjuku Underground Town Subroad

##### Shinjuku Underground Town Subroad

Move west and then down the north hall way and near the payphones is the chest, it has an Int Augment Chip I.

![](/ffaq/40/48/)

Then go south west all the way to the end next to the lockers to find this chest, this one contains Def Augment Chip I.

![](/ffaq/40/49/)

Go slightly east and south downstairs to Marunonaka Line: Shinjuku Station.

##### Marunonaka Line: Shinjuku Station.

Go west and then north all the way at the end of the hall next to the vending machine is the chest, it has an Attack Augment Chip I.

![](/ffaq/40/50/)

Then go back south and east through the gate and you'll find another chest on the east wall next to some trashcans, this one has a SPD Augment Chip I.

![](/ffaq/40/51/)

Then go down the stairs to the north, then go south on the platform you will find the chest next to 3 trashcans again, this one has an SPI Agument chip I.

![](/ffaq/40/52/)

With that done make your way back above ground and go to Higashi Shinjuku Vision Square.

##### Higashi Shinjuku Vision Square

Near the center of the area in front of the cone like structure is where you'll find this chest which has a, Friendship S.

![](/ffaq/40/53/)

Then take the north exit to Higashi Shinjuku: Koshu Kaido Intersection.

##### Higashi Shinjuku: Koshu Kaido Intersection

Move north and you'll find the chest next to Weekly Mart, it contains an SP Augment Chip I.

![](/ffaq/40/54/)

Next go north all the way to near the end and go west behind the entrance to the underground is the chest, it contains SPI Augment Chip I.

![](/ffaq/40/55/)

That's all the chests currently available in the game. Now let's go to the objective.

##### Finding the Coordinates

Go to Shinjuku Underground Subroad by taking the stairs down from Shinjuku Station: Jubancho Intersection.

Once reach the location a scene will play. Then go to Seibu Shinjuku Overbridge East to the next objective.

Lastly, go to Nishi Shinjuku, Shinjuku Park: Waterfall Plaza for the last objective.

After the scenes you will be given a mission to investigate the anomaly in Kabukicho.

Go to Kabukicho and take the north exit to enter A Certain Back Alley.

##### Shinjuku: A Certain Back Alley

In this back alley there are 2 chests to collect first. 

First go north to the Taxi parking spot you will find the chest next to the vending machine, this contains Friendship S.

![](/ffaq/40/56/)

Proceed west and then north to find another chest next to a blue trash can, it has a SPI Augment Chip I>

![](/ffaq/40/57/)

Then make your way back south to the first open area in the alley with the blonde man nearby.

Analyze and the door way will appear as feathers rotate around the door. Go through it.

#### The In-Between Theater and Digimon Farm

Uhhhh, welcome to the velvet room... I guess.

The bar tender to the right sells basically everything, costumes, skill disks, equipment, food items for the farm and so on.

Now approach Mirei at her information desk.

You can now access the farm. In the farm you can place some digimon and then have them train to increase their stats or feed them food to boost their bond.

Training digimon stats takes real world time with no way to speed it up, it's a good way to train digimon you aren't actively using.  
However you only have 1 item per stat right now so you're limited in what you can train.

Mirei will contact you via text when training is done, and by replying to her you can have the digimon CONTINUE the same training without needing to go back to the Theater.

Stats obtained from training are added directly to the related stat, there no limit to the stats gained from training and they are NOT added to cummulative like stats for chips or like in cyber sleuth. That said 10% of stats obtained from training is added to cummulative stats when evolving.

You can also feed digimon in the farm, every digimon has different likes and dislikes. Food they love tend to give them 2% more bond where as anything else gives 1% or less.

Lastly, Digimon in farms passively collect materials for us.

That's all we can do for now when satisfied leave the theater.

Your next objective is to go back to the Misono Residence, but you can now also reenter the sewer via the manhole cover next to the govt. building.

When ready head back to your attic room, you can now change clothes here too (though why bother when you can do it via menu).

Change clothes and rest on the sofa.

#### Resonanting Thoughts

After you wake up Operator will have unlocked Agent skills for us. As you complete missions you will gain Anomaly Points, use these in the Agent skills menus to unlock nodes in the skill tree.

There are 5 trees, 4 of them are based on personality types of digimon boosting their stats, where as the 5th Bond of Loyalty unlocks better experience gains and stats for all personality types and unlocks Cross Arts.

It's up to you what you unlock first, but I suggest getting new cross arts first.

By spending 10 points you will level up to Agent Rank 2. There are 10 ranks in total and as you rank up by spending points you become able to evolve digimon to higher levels. For example you need rank 3 for Champion evolutions and 5 for Ultimate.

When ready go down stairs.

After the scenes speak to Inori again.

Then we need to go to the same back alley where the In-Between Theater is and meet with Hiroko.

#### Shinjuku Underground Waterway: North Block

Digimon Found  
---  
Tokomon| Tsunomon  
Betamon| Chuumon  
Falcomon| Lopmon  
Geremon| Tapirmon  
Dracmon|   
  
We're now in another dungeon, time for more exploring!

Proceed south following Coo, then turn west to find a chest near a Falcomon. The chest has 2 HP Sprays.

![](/ffaq/40/58/)

Once you catch up to Coo he will run off. Go back north and then east.

Turn south first and it will lead to a chest at a dead end, this chest has a Poison Wall I (an equipment which nullifies Poison).

![](/ffaq/40/59/)

Continue to follow after Coo, from the previous fork go east and then north, destroy the rubble. After a call from Operator proceed north and then west again to find a chest, this one has an ATK Attachment I.

![](/ffaq/40/60/)

Continue on the path clearing rubble and fighting mons, you will see Coo again in a hall filled with metal barrels, it will run off again.

Proceed east after it, and then south and then west. After you catch up here he will use a vent to get away....SIGH.

When he does so check the south dead end for another chest, this one has a Dispel Skill Disk, it removes any debuffs from a digimon.

![](/ffaq/40/61/)

Follow Coo west and he'll close the shutter on you, turn around and find a power box, use a digimon with any electric attack and do a digi attack on it.

Go through the gate and it close behind you, then go north after Coo, there is a chest right here with an Attack Bind Skill Disk.

![](/ffaq/40/62/)

Continue to follow Coo, west and then south, stop and continue south and you'll find a sort of control room, there is a chest here containing an SP Augment Chip.

![](/ffaq/40/63/)

Use the control panel to open the sluice gate, this will block off Coo's escape route.

Following him again until he reaches a dead end........only for him to escape again.

Follow him until he takes the east most exit to another area.

You will arrive at the Underground Reservoir, there aren't any digimon here, proceed down the steps and then north to find a chest next to a pillar, this one has an SP Attachment I.

![](/ffaq/40/64/)

Make the following prep before the upcoming boss fight:

  *  **Bring Vaccine type digimon equip them with Wind Skills**
  *  **If you have it unlocked equip Cross Art: Burst**



Now make your way to the objective and find Coo, after a scene find him again in the north.

Then approach Coo one last time.

##### Cyclonemon

Another Virus Type Champion. He is weak to Wind element and resists Earth and Fire damage.

He will primarily attack Cuu, your cross art (Burst) can also deal a lot of damage so use it when it's ready.

Aside from that it's the same as before use attack's weak to via digimon of Vaccine type.

After it loses 25% HP it will increase it's attack rate to 2 per turn.

Then once it nears 50% it will use an attack on Cuu and a scene will play. 

Aegiomon will join the fight as a guest after this.

He comes with wind claw so you can buff his attack or rely on him to attack as well.

From here the fight will proceed normally. Cyclonemon isn't that hard at this point deal damage, build CP use another Cross Art and you should be good!

Watch the scenes and this mission is complete!

## Walkthrough

### Chapter 2: Aegiomon and Inori

#### Genius or Crackpot

Kosuke apparently wants us to tag along with him somewhere. Head on downstairs to the living room.

After the scene you can choose to head there directly or go there at your own pace.

You can also now enter the previous dungeon freely.

Make your way to the park and then go north to the truck for a scene.

You will then have a mock battle between a Special Forces Soldier and Aegiomon.

Just use a few attacks on the soldier until the fight is cut short.

After the scenes follow Aegiomon to the north east exit to find him with the other kids, the day will end after some scenes.

#### A Vow Made Under the Starry Sky

After the scenes head down stairs, then leave the building.

As you leave you will get a message from Hiroko about Missing T Shirts. This marks the beginning of Side Missions.

Side Missions unlock as you progress through the story, completing them will give useful rewards such as money, equipment, upgrade items  
and Anomaly Points.

##### Mystery of the Missing T Shirts

Meet Hiroko in Kosuke's office. Speak to her and take on the mission, then go to the T shirt shop in the shopping district. Speak to the old man outside it.

Go into the back alley across from the shop and go north and then north east past the taxi parking to see a man outside the entrance to underground dungeon from the previous chapter.

From the beginning of the dungeon move south to where you first cornered Coo. You will find a ZubaEagermon regardless of how you answer his question a boss fight will begin.

Zubaeagermon is a Vaccine type so using Data Type digimon is more effective. Also if you have a Cross Arts: Burst ready you can wipe almost his entire HP very quickly.

After that you'll be done with this mission and will get your reward. 

Back to our main mission make your way to Shinjuku park and speak to the marked NPC.

Go to the marked area and examine thar hand symbol, Aegiomon will suggest searching in the next area.

To the north is a small path Aegiomon is looking at a box, scan and destroy it. Then go to the hand symbol nearby.

Follow the foot prints into the underground dungeon where you first met Kosuke and Inori.

##### Shinjuku Underground: South Block Revisit

Go under the gap and follow the foot prints.

Eventually they will vanish and Operator will set your next objective follow it to a dead end and a stranger light.

#### Outer Dungeon

Make your way to the objective for a scene. You will be unable to use maps here.

Chests in this area look like weird green cube like blocks, you'll find one to after turning right from the scene, the chest contains Sprite Recovery.

![](/ffaq/40/65/)

Next you'll find some floating trash blocking your path, destroy it and go through the sphere, this will warp you to another location.

Then go straight towards the 2 Vademons.

Vademon is a virus type but they also know Character Reversal so they will become the opposite if they use it on themselves.  
They are weak to no element attacks and fire too, they also resist Ice (Character reversal alters these too).

You will receive 2 Vademon cards from winning.

After the scenes go and speak to Inori in the living room and then go to the roof. 

Watch the scenes and the current Mission comes to an end.

## Walkthrough

### Chapter 3: Enter Minervamon

#### Shinjuku Rhapsody

Another new day. For now head downstairs, after the scenes head on out.

When you leave the building the kid from before will show up and give you a Jogmon Ultimate Card Game Starter Set.

This is this game's version of the digimon card game. You can review the rules in the tutorial menu and this guide's section for the card game.

##### Card Game Side Stuff

  * You can find the boy from before near Weekly Mart. You can challenge him to a card battle.
  * A boy in a black shirt in the back alley.
  * A man in Shinuku Park
  * A girl with brown hair, glasses and pink undershirt in Shinjuku Vision Square
  * A young man with black hair and a blue overshirt in Shinjuku Underground Town: Subroad



When you're done playing around head to Kabuki-cho.

There will be a huge crowd speak to the man in blue and make your way through, then speak to a student and then a store clerk until you finally make it through the crowd.

You'll meet 2 familiar faces and then a boss fight.

##### Greymon (Blue)

He is noticeably weaker since he has yet to become an Ultimate. He is a Virus type and is weak to Ice, Water and Null element and resists Fire and Dark. It will gain the Strong status at the start buffing it's attacks.

Use Vaccine types with the correct elements. Be careful he also gains CP in battle, can buff himself and gain extra attacks.

Minervamon is also helping us as a guest.

Once his CP reaches 3 he will enter a charging stance. In this state it is about to attack using a Special skill. 

We can stop it by breaking it's Breaking Point Gauge (the gauge below it's HP), doing so will reset CP and stop the special skill, plus he will lose the Strong Status.

If you are for some reason unable to break him in time guard and use items to heal up.

Greymon's Head Shell resists most elements so using normal element attacks is best (Dark is also fine).

If you stop him before his CP reaches 6 it should break him, creating a perfect opening to lay into him.

It will recover after a turn and will regain Strong a turn after that.

Once that battle is over watch the scenes.

Then call it a day and this Mission is complete!

## Walkthrough

### Chapter 4: Monica Simmons and Outer Dungeons

#### The In-Between

Once you have control be sure to unlock new agent skills, at this point you should have reached Agent Rank 3 allowing you to evolve your digimon up to the Champion level!

Note: If you don't like what your mon becomes you can revert it, though I recommend having it gain stats from leveling before hand though.

Remember a mon only inherits cummulative stats if they have a bond higher than 0, and even then its best to have it as high as possible.

When ready go downstairs. After the scenes go directly to the park. Speak to the man outside the truck.

The go to Shinjuku Station: East Exit, enter the station and go through the ticket gate to go to Akihabara.

#### Akihabara Electric Town

The second you arrive you are given 1 new side quest (2 if you have the public security dlc) to take care of. See below for those.

There are 2 more people you can card battle here: the first is a boy on the south west end of the area and the 2nd a store cleark outside a store north of where you enter (east wall).

West of the entrance at the namco store near a sign is a chest as show below, it contains Friendship S

![](/ffaq/40/66/)

On the north end of the area you will find a shop which sells skill disks.

Further north next to the taxi is a chest, this chest has SP Augment Chip I.

![](/ffaq/40/67/)

Simmons isn't here but in the alleys to the north so head there next.

##### To do the job, You need to dress the part

(This side quest is if you bought the Public Safety DLC Costume, it is also somewhat spoiler-y)  
This quest doesn't give anomaly points.

Find Asuna Shiroki just slightly north of the entrance to the electric town area (you can track the mission to find her easily) then speak to her and wear the Public Safety outfit.

You will then fight 2 Bakemon.

You'll get an SP Agument Chip I and some money as a reward.

#### Akihabara: A Certain Back Alley

There is another card battle opponent, a man in a suit just north of Weekly Mart.

Also near the start of the area turn right near a vending machine to find a chest, it has an INT Augment Chip I.

![](/ffaq/40/68/)

Continue down the alley east and you will find a guy selling cards, their pretty pricey so be sure to watch how much you spend.

Keep going east and then north a bit to find another chest next to a blue trash can, it has a Talent Awakening Booster.

![](/ffaq/40/69/)

##### Infinite Imagination

Hiroko is waiting in Kosuke's office again....

Speak to her and she will inform you of the objective being in the back alley in Akihabara.

Find Hiroko near the north east end of the back alleys near a dead end. You'll then need to find some blocks.

The first one is here:

![](/ffaq/40/70/)

Then the 2nd one is here:

![](/ffaq/40/71/)

Bring both blocks back to Kuroi and you will have a boss fight against a large ToyAgumon.

ToyAgumon is a vaccine type so data types are effective, he is also weak to wind element skills.

After beating this enemy the mission is complete.

Completing the above mission unlocks another one after you move to another area.

##### The Secret Getaway

Hiroko never stops, meet with her at Shinjuku Park.

Move north towards the Community Forest and you will be stopped by Shiroki.

She will for whatever reason have you help her in tracking a digimon, in the next area go north to find a Guilmon.

After which he will go into the sewers. Follow him down and speak to him.

You will then fight him, he isn't that strong, as a virus type he is weak to vaccine types.

It's a quick and easy fight. This mission is completed after.

When you move to another area a new side quest will pop and of course it's another Hiroko quest.

##### The Father of Shinjuku

Meet Hiroko outside the coffee shop in Shinjuku (just track the mission to make it easy to find).

Thankfully the request isn't for Hiroko as much as it for the Fortune Teller. He wants us to find 4 lost digimon and bring them to him.

Go to the Overbridge Intersection to find the first one, he is disguised as a man in a white shirt, speak to him and you will go back to the Fortune Teller.

For the 2nd lost digimon go to Vision Square and find a woman next to one of the plant enclosures there will be a blond man next to her, speak to her to get her to reveal her true form.

For the 3rd digimon go to Shinjuku Station East Gate, via Vision Square and you find the disguised digimon as a boy in the coffee shop.

For the last digimon go to the Tokyo Metropolitan Government Building and find a black car parked outside the building, interact with it.

With that this mission is complete. 

No more side quests for now thankfully. Make your way to Akihabara Back Alley and find Simmons directly north outside a store.

After speaking with Simmons and watching a scene go to the Marunaka Line in Shinjuku Station (can be reached Vision Square -> Shinjuku Station Subroad). Just follow the objective marker.

Then speak to the man in the suit there.

##### Forgotten Rails (8 Years Ago)

We're here again, make your way in to find the group of agents. After the scene approach the portal.

#### Outer Dungeon

Digimon Found  
---  
Black Gatomon  
Tyrannomon  
  
As I said before there is no map here so you'll be eye balling navigation. There are also Champion level digimon here so be sure your party is up to snuff.

After the scene go straight and you'll run into a group of Black Gatomons.

To the right is a Tyranomon if you want to fight it but nothing else there, the first Black Gatomon is here.

Go left, then straight ahead all the way to a chest, it contains Training Set Sauna A.

On the way to the chest the BlackGatomon is hiding in an open space.

![](/ffaq/40/72/)

Proceed to the left and find the last BlackGatomon.

Once all are beaten a new group will appear at the end of the dungeon.

Approach and defeat them it won't be hard their weak to Vaccine types and Light.

After that you'll be taken back to the park, so approach the Public Security Vehicle.

Watch the scenes and this mission is complete.

#### Side Quest and Outer Dungeon Clean up

If you didn't do the prior side quests you should do them now.

Go out to the shopping district and turn to the left and you'll find some trash you can clear with a DigiAttack this will reveal an Outer Dungeon from Ages Past. These are special optional dungeons you can find all over, clearing these difficult trials will grant great rewards.

When you enter you will be presented with a message explaining the nature of this place.

##### Time Attack Boss Battle 3

When ready to proceed interact with the large digivice keychain. The clear condition is to defeat the boss at the end before time runs out.

Be warned in this area you cannot use items or change your party composition once you enter. In all likelihood you cannot beat this one just yet. I suggest coming back later you can access this place any time via the Theater In Between.

You cannot save, or use most digivice functions. Naturally you won't be able to scan enemies here either.

There are also crystals next to the keychain which give certain messages upon clearing certain unique conditions such as one shotting enemies using DigiAttacks.

After you clear the trial a digimon will be displayed on the screen of the keychain which can then be added to your box by talking to it.

Lastly, these missions can be repeated as many times as you want for grinding purposes.

Another Outer Dungeon can be found in the Akihabara back alley in the alley between the Card Shop and the Taxi.   
(Not the side quest related one).

##### Time Attack Boss Battle 1

Same rules as the previous one beat the boss in a time limit. Most of the enemies are vaccine or data types around rookie to champion level.

The Boss is Reppamon. It is a Vaccine type so ideally use Data types if you can otherwise focus on it's other weaknesses. Such as Fire.

Beware it has a move called Triple action meaning it can now act 3 times on the turn order.

There are also 2 chests to collect in here if you can find them.

This one should be very beatable for you right now.

The digimon reward will be Reppamon

Another Outer Dungeon can be found on the train platform at the Marunaka Line.

##### Survive to The End 2

This one has a different rule set, you need to survive until the end of the time limit.

Enemies will continue to spawn chasing you around the arena until time runs out, these enemies have more HP than normal so take a lot of time to fight. 

The enemies that appear in this arena are: Botamon, Greymon, Geogreymon and MetalGreymon.

In short you want Data Types and those with Ice/water movies. Avoid fighting early on so you don't use up resources and avoid MetalGreymons at all cost. Have at least one mon that can heal your party in battle (must have high SP).

If you ever end up cornered by the enemy use a digiattack to enter battle before they force you into it. After the battle you will have a second or 2 to get away from the remaining enemies.

This will be all about resource management and planning as much as running.

There is one bonus message for this area, it requires you to clear this trial without being caught by an enemy preemptive attack even once.

The reward digimon is Nanimon!

There is one last Outer Dungeon you can find in the Back Alley where you first entered the Theater In Between, go there and go to the dead end in the far north west end of the area.

##### Survive To The End 1

Same deal as the last but it's a bit easier. Fire based Vaccine types are best here.

This one has Pabumon, Numemon, Geremon, Sukamon and Platinum Sukamon. These enemies aren't strong but they are REALLY FAST, it's easy to get caught in a preemptive attack if you get careless. Don't let PlatinumSukamon catch you, if he starts chasing you start a battle with another mon to give you a chance to escape.

One strategy I found useful is to stand still in a corner and only attack enemies that get close or spawn from the circle close by.

The rewarded digimon is Raremon. The condition for the special message is the same as before survive without being caught by a preemptive strike.

There is also 1 (or 2 if you have DLC) new side quest which has popped up.

##### The Targeted Cosplayer

This is a DLC Costume related Side quest.

Go and call Hiroko at the marked location in Shinjuku Park. Walk around the park in the Chosen Children DLC outfit and things will happen.

Defeat the digimon that pops up shouldn't be hard (If you think Im phoning it it's cuz I am it's a DLC quest with barely any importance).

##### Between Worlds

For this quest go to A Certain Back Alley in Akihabara and in the north east most area you will find a portal to an Outer Dungeon and an Agumon speak to him to get the load down.

Enter the portal and you'll find an Orochimon and a Gabumon. And then a great moment of Fanservice.

This fight isn't hard, Omnimon carries us through it.

You'll complete the side quest after the battle.

That's everything when ready return back to the Misono Residence and rest in the Attic.

## Walkthrough

### Chapter 5: The Egg and The Titans

#### Truth Born from an Egg

Go downstairs for some scenes.

Go to the Marunonaka Line again and go down to the platform. After the scene open the gate and walk on the tracks.

Then go down stairs.

You'll find yourself back in the resevoir where we fought Cyclonemon.

#### Shinjuku Underground: Resevoir + Waterway Depths

Digimon Found  
---  
Goburimon  
  
Follow the shadow to a metal gate and then when you arrive try to break the gate (you'll fail) and Minervamon will break it for us.

 **WARNING: POINT OF NO RETURN AHEAD. YOU WILL BE UNABLE TO RETURN TO THE HUMAN WORLD AFTER THE UPCOMING SCENES. MAKE ALL YOUR PREPARATION BEFORE HAND.**

 **Extra Warning: Certain digivolutions require items from the human world so buy the following so you don't have to wait till MUCH LATER.**

  1.  **4 Barbeque Skewer Sets**
  2.  **3 Fruit Tarts**



 **Anything else can always be accessed from the Theater In- Between.**

Then proceed to the Waterway Depths, follow the path and you'll arive at a dead end and a scene.  
You will then have a boss fight.

##### Titamon

He starts the fight by instantly killing one ally. (Unless he attacks Minervamon in which case nothing happens).

Despite what you'd think you CAN win this fight.

As he is a Virus type Vaccine is effective, element wise use Fire and Light, avoid Dark and Earth.

Using Aegiomon's Attract Echo will keep his attacks off your party.

When he charges up to use a big attack have everyone guard. Aegiomon should heal and attact most of his attacks while your Vaccine Fire attacks deal damage.

Past 50% he will use a status barrier to prevent debuffing him.

Once his HP is near the end and he has used his charged attack a 2nd time.

From there just lower his HP down to 0 and the fight will end as will this mission.

## Walkthrough

### Chapter 6: Welcome to the Digital World

#### Unknown Sewers

We're in some weird sewer like place, we can't open the map. Move straight and then turn left and destory the rubble to reveal an Outer Dungeon.

 **WARNING: IF YOU EVER FIND A DIGI-JEWEL WHILE EXPLORING IN THE DIGITAL WORLD (Likely from destroying objects) DO NOT SELL IT UNLESS YOU HAVE MORE THAN 3.**

##### Protect the Giant Meat 2

This is a new type of trial, this one relies on defeating enemies before they reach past your defense line (to the giant meat).

The enemies in this area are Botamon, Falcomon, Kamemon, Ginryumon and Birdramon.

Unlike normal situations you can actually avoid battle when using a DigiAttack. Weaker enemies will go down in one hit but stronger ones will require multiple hits.

Your goal is tro prevent any mon from reach your side of the field and eliminate all 30 enemies. You basically need to spam digiattacks.

This is a good way to get easy low effort Exp.

Avoid being forced into battles as this will give smaller mons a chance to get ahead of you.

Keep the map open so you can track the enemies without issue.

This isn't hard at all it just takes some getting used to.

Your digimon reward for this trial is Dinohyumon. To unlock the crystal message you need to clear this mission by defeating enemies using only DigiAttack, do not enter battle.

Once you're done here head back to the sewer and continue on the path until you reach a ladder.

#### Central Town

Man when was the last time a Digimon Story game brought us to the digital world.

In any case move north and you can find an accessory shop and skill disc shop. Then north east you'll find a door go inside to find a Tanemon.

You can challenge Tanemon to a card game, also you can open the fridge to find a Punimon who gives you an HP Capsule.

Challenging digimon to the card game is different from humans as they use many different cards than those you fought in the human world.

Any head back out and talk to Pegasusmon and then go north and speak to Chuumon, then go further to check the food shop for a scene.

Across of the food shop is a door into a house go inside and you'll see an Extyrannomon pretending to be a plushie.

Speak to him a few times even turn away and try to leave but turn around (you'll notice his eyes poke out) and then keep interacting with him until he gets fed up and gives you a Known Bug. It's a useful equipment which reverses Attributes at the start of battle.

Now go towards the central square.

Next go to the east exit.

#### Downtown

Go straight and you'll find a Betamon you can Card Battle.

There is also a card shop ahead. Nothing else to do so head to the objective to meet Merukimon.

Inside the Tavern you can challenge Deputymon and Starmon to card battles.

When ready to proceed try to go through the door in the back and a scene will play.

Then leave the tavern. Make your to the marked house and enter.

After speaking to Chuumon leave the house.

After another scene speak to Lunamon.

Follow Lunamon and speak to Hagurumon. After you do so you can enter the In-Between Theater from here, there will be an optional scene if you do. When ready enter the sewers.

#### Spiral Waterway

Digimon Found  
---  
Snimon| Penmon  
Otamon| Dokugumon  
Keramon| Drimogemon  
Gazimon|   
  
Before anything else turn around and go west to find some barrels behind you, destroy them to reveal an Outer Dungeon!

##### Fight Ultimate Digimon 1

For this one you must make your way through the dungeon and defeat 3 very powerful digimon from the master's collection.

There are many different digimon here, including Ultimate level digimon. You must defeat any 3.

Each platform has a warp point to another digimon so you have to choose a route to the target digimon.

Most routes go like this Rookie -> Champion -> Ultimate. With one route leading to a Mega level SlashAngemon instead (avoid this route).

There is also a single route where the final opponent is a suped up Pabumon (In Training).

For clearing this challenge you will get a Pabumon (a suped up one).

Tips:

  1. Type advantages are a major boon here, so select your party and route ahead of time.
  2. Also have Cross Art: Strike or Alternatively a healing Cross Art.
  3. If you beat even one route then you can use to help carry you through other routes on subsequent attempts.
  4. DO NOT attempt to fight SlashAngemon he is too strong.



Below is each route.

1st Choice| Route 1| Route 2  
---|---|---  
Rookie| Armadillomon  
(Free)| Falcomon  
(Vaccine)  
2nd Choice| Route 3| Route 4| Route 5| Route 6  
Champion| Tuskmon  
(Virus)| Drimogemon  
(Data)| IceDevimon  
(Virus)| Deputymon  
(Vaccine)  
3rd Choice| Route 7| Route 8| Route 9| Route 10| Route 11| Route 12| Route 13| Route 14  
Ultimate/Mega| SlashAngemon  
(Mega)| Matadormon  
(Virus)| 

MetalTyrannomon  
(Virus)

| Mamemon  
(Data)| Pabumon  
(In-Training)| Datamon  
(Virus)| BigMamemon  
(Data)| Rapidmon  
(Vaccine)  
  
Defeating any digimon here will award a trophy item, these are marks of mastery if you collect 10 (duplicates do NOT COUNT) you can unlock the message crystal.

Now go back to the sewers.

Follow the path until you reach Little Bearmon for a scene.

Now go east of where Bearmon was, you'll find a chest at this dead end, it contains a DEF Augment Chip I.

![](/ffaq/40/73/)

Go back out and proceed south and then west, stop mid way and destroy the trash blocking the doorway to the north.

Here you will find a chest to the north east, this chest has Death Wall, this prevents instant Death.

![](/ffaq/40/74/)

Go back out and continue on the path through the sewer.

Eventually you'll reach a metal gate, break it open and go through, you will find 2 chests in here, they have Magma Fall and EVA Attachment inside.

![](/ffaq/40/75/)

Continue down the sewer until you reach the objective then get ready for a fight. Prepare some Vaccine type digimon.

##### Ogremon Trio

Not quite bosses but this is still a story focused scripted battle. Each one is a virus type with slightly different elemental weaknesses.

Their pretty easy, after the first attack Minveramon will join in. And as the battle proceeds a scene will occur and Aegiomon will learn Stun Beat Blow.

For each of his allies defeast Ogremon's defense and spirit is lowered.

This mission will be completed after the group is beaten!

#### Gathering Storm Clouds

You can now reach Agent Level 4!

Return to the tavern and speak to Knightmon.

After the scenes return to Downtown, the paths blocked by Guardromon are now open.

West of the card shop is a ladder, go up to the ladder and continue north until you rind a large crate, destroy it to reveal an Outer Dungeon.

##### Fight Ultimate Digimon 3

For this one you must make your way through the dungeon and defeat 3 very powerful digimon from the master's collection.

There are many different digimon here, including Mega level digimon. You must defeat any 3.

Each platform has a warp point to another digimon so you have to choose a route to the target digimon.

Most routes go like this Rookie -> Champion -> Ultimate. With one route leading to a Mega level Rosemon instead (avoid this route).

For clearing this challenge you will get CatchMamemon (this is great because it's an early Ultimate Level).

Tips:

  1. Type advantages are a major boon here, so select your party and route ahead of time.
  2. Also have Cross Art: Strike or Alternatively a healing Cross Art.
  3. If you beat even one route then you can use CatchMamemon to help carry you through other routes on subsequent attempts.
  4. Don't attempt Rosemon, she is WAAAAY out of your league even with CatchMamemon.



Below is each route.

1st Choice| Route 1| Route 2  
---|---|---  
Rookie| Salamon  
(Vaccine)| Chuumon  
(Virus)  
2nd Choice| Route 3| Route 4| Route 5| Route 6  
Champion| Tankmon  
(Data)| Ginryumon  
(Vaccine)| Centarumon  
(Data)| Deltamon  
(Virus)  
3rd Choice| Route 7| Route 8| Route 9| Route 10| Route 11| Route 12| Route 13| Route 14  
Ultimate/Mega| CatchMamemon  
(Data)| Mummymon  
(Virus)| 

Wingdramon  
(Vaccine)

| Rosemon  
(Mega)| Angewomon  
(Vaccine)| Arukenimon  
(Virus)| Hisayaryumon  
(Vaccine)| Groundramon  
(Virus)  
  
Defeating any digimon here will award a trophy item, these are marks of mastery if you collect 30 (duplicates do NOT COUNT) you can unlock the message crystal.

Each one of these challenges has a different number of mons discounting Rosemon there are 13 here you can earn, so you won't be able to unlock this message crystal until you get more marks of mastery/trophies from other Ultimate Digimon Trials.

Return back to Downtown and make your way to the west exit of the area, speak to Pegasusmon and he will carry you across to the next area.

#### Central Isle

Digimon Found  
---  
Centarumon| FunBeemon  
Gazimon| Otamon  
ToyAgumon| Dokugumon  
Snimon| Shoutmon  
  
There will be enemies here, there is also a chest immediately in front of you, it contains ATK Augment Chip I.

![](/ffaq/40/76/)

Continue north destroying rubble and then go down a ladder there will be another chest to the left, it contains a Def Augment Chip I.

![](/ffaq/40/77/)

Continue north and as the path turns you'll find another chest behind a Centarumon, it contains a Training Set Boombox A.

![](/ffaq/40/78/)

Go north again after destroying rubble and you'll reach a fork, go north to where a Snimon and FunBeemon are, defeat them and you'll find a chest here, it contains an INT Augment Chip

![](/ffaq/40/79/)

Go back to the fork and continue north all the way to the elevator and use it.

#### Central Tower: Entrance

No enemies up here go around the metal pillar and barrel to find a chest a little bit before the Mamemon, it contains an HP Spray I.

![](/ffaq/40/80/)

Go to the objective for a scene. Then approach the elevator and speak to Hagurumon. Then go up.

#### Steel Maze

Digimon Found  
---  
Kudamon| Funbeemon  
Solarmon| Airdramon  
Goburimon|   
Kotemon|   
  
Go up the ladder and destroy the rubble to the left and speak to the Hagurumon, carry him to the gear on the right and he will lower the bridge.

Proceed east and then go up a ladder. Go north east and you'll find a chest across the bridge it contains a Spd Augment Chip I.

![](/ffaq/40/81/)

Then carry the Hagurumon here to the other gears in the west to lower a different bridge. Go up the ladder again.

Move east and then go around the square shaped path to reach a chest behind some barrels, it contains SP Spray I.

![](/ffaq/40/82/)

Once again continue east and before going upstairs, check further east and cross a steel beam to reach a chest. This one has a Mental Field Skill Disk.

![](/ffaq/40/83/)

Now go up the stairs to the next area.

#### Steel Periphery

Digimon Found  
---  
Funbeemon| Waspmon  
Shoutmon|   
Goburimon|   
Kotemon|   
  
Go up the stairs and you'll reach a chest which contains, INT attachment I.

![](/ffaq/40/84/)

Proceed north and when you reach another staircase go under it from the right and destroy some barrels to find a chest, this one has a Full Revival Spray.

![](/ffaq/40/85/)

Now just climb your way up the stairs and continue north west then up a slope and a ladder and finally you'll reach the elevator.

Go up to the next area.

#### Steel Maze 2

Digimon Found  
---  
Kudamon| Funbeemon  
Solarmon| Airdramon  
Goburimon|   
Kotemon|   
  
Make your way east again and then cross the gap using the steel beam and then directly north is a chest, this chest has an INT Augment Chip I.

![](/ffaq/40/86/)

Go up the ladder to the east and then west and north for another chest, this one has a Mediator Skill Disk.

![](/ffaq/40/87/)

Go west and then south to find some rubble, clear it out and you'll find a Hagurumon, carry it to the gears nearby.

Go up the ladder again and then go west to find a chest across a steel beam, this one has an Electric Guard

![](/ffaq/40/88/)

From here go east and you'll reach 2 elevators. Take the right elevator down and go get the Hagurumon on this floor and go back up using the elevator.

Place it in the gear to call down the elevator and ride it up.

#### Steel Point

Digimon Found  
---  
Funbeemon| Waspmon  
Shoutmon| Kapurimon  
Goburimon| Dracomon  
Kotemon| Tyrannomon  
  
In this area lightning will randomly strike a digimon on your or the enemy side. However it prioritizes metallic digimon regardless of side. You can use this to prevent weaker digimon from taking hits. Beware Lightning causes Paralysis.

Proceed west and then south before you reach some stairs, go under the stairs to find a chest, this one has 2 Paralysis Recovery.

![](/ffaq/40/89/)

Go up the stairs and you'll reach an elevator you can use a Digiattack with a mon that can use a water skill to go back down to the bottom of the tower, to the door leading to The Theater Between and prepare for the upcoming boss.

When ready to proceed go up the stairs further south until you reach near the end, you can destroy rubble here to have another gate to the Theater In Between.

Next to the stairs are 2 chests, they contain Aqua Pressure II Skill Disk and Revival Pill DX.

![](/ffaq/40/90/)

Go up the stairs and prepare for a boss fight. Bring Data (Or Virus if you want to use Reverse) Type digimon. Normal and Fire Skills or if you use a reverse strategy then Lightning and Wind.

##### Parrotmon

Parrotmon is a Vaccine type. It resists Wind and is immune to Electricity, but is weak to Fire.

I found it's a good idea to reverse it so Aegiomon's skills are still useful against it.

After it reaches past 75% HP it will use Double Action and as it nears 50% it will buff it's speed permanently being able to act more often.

It will also begin to heal at this point, Merukimon will join the fray shortly after this.

After it's pushed to below 50% it will enter a Charging Stance. You know what to do target the wings, the wings are weak to Null Element, do not reverse the wings as Merukimon will do a ton of damage to them on his own.

Once Parrotmon is broken you can lay into him. Finish him off before he can move again.

With that this mission is complete.

## Walkthrough

### Chapter 7: Factorial Area

#### Incoming Conflict

With the previous mission done you have more Agent points to use.

You can also explore Central Town freely, you also have new side quests here!

##### The Blacksmith's Request

Make your way to the shopping area of Central Town where you first came out of the Sewer and speak to Zudomon outside Tanemon's house.

Zudomon will want the some materials (finally a use for these), namely Rusty Iron Texture.

This will complete the mission. You will now have unlocked Zudomon's shop.

Here you can make Training Items to use in the DigiFarm as well as decorations for them.

You will need materials for this some you may have and some you won't use these as needed.

##### A Delayed Return

Go to Downtown and make your way to Pegasusmon and speak to the Hagurumon next to him.

Make your way to Central Tower and find the Hagurumon on the ground floor. There is also a solarmon here, ignore it and speak to the Hagurumon once he's up you can leave and you'll be taken back to the requester Hagurumon when you go down the elevator.

This side quest is done now go to the tavern to meet Merukimon.

After the scenes a new DLC quest is available if you have the related costume.

##### Knowledge is the death of Fear (Costume DLC Quest)

Speak to Agumon and Gatomon inside your house in Central Town, put on the Digimon Costume and then speak to Patamon and Palmon.

Then speak to Agumon and Gatomon and we're done.

Now go back to Central Town entrance/shopping area and approach the huge Blimp (Blimpmon).

Make any prep you want and then board Blimpmon to go to the Factorial Area.

#### Factorial Town

After the scenes go to the objective and speak to Guardromon (Gold).

Before you go down to find Kokuwamon go north up to a platform with train tracks. There is a Guardromon here, to the left of him is a blue barrel, attack this blue barrel to reveal an Outer Dungeon.

##### Speed Is Victory 2

Before you do this trial you need buy a pass from Vademon for 5000 yen, per attempt.....rip off. This essentially reduces the reward by 5000.

This is basically a race where you ride a Peckmon and try to complete 3 laps before the opponent, in this case Witchmon.

The controls are a bit janky as you need to hold use the stick to pick the direction Peckmon goes not it's speed.

Witchmon wont be physically on the course but as a pixelated fast moving sprite above you. There will also be enemies who explode on impact with you.

Obstacles like boxes and barrels will cover the course and will slow you down on impact.

Meat can also be found and when picked up will boost your speed a lot for a bit.

Clearing this will reward you with Witchmon. For the crystal message you need to complete the race without hitting any enemies or obstacles.

Return to Guardromon Gold and go down south and get on the elevator.

Once you get off the elevator look west to see a chest containing HP Capsule II.

![](/ffaq/40/91/)

Continue east and you'll find some digimon discussing the situation there are also 3 houses you can enter (plus a Vademon shop).

The first house on the right side has Kapurimon inside that you can challenge to a card game.

Then continue on the path down until you reach Kokuwamon. Speak to him, then go up to the Vademon to buy a fuse.

Report back to Kokuwamon and use a DigiAttack with a mon with electric moves equipped.

Make any prep and speak to him again to enter the lower inner parts of the area.

#### Factorial Area

Digimon Found  
---  
Guardromon| Clockmon| Tankmon  
Gargomon| Mechanorimon|   
Choromon| Solarmon|   
Shamamon| Kamemon|   
Hagurumon| Goburimon|   
  
As you enter the area you'll see Kokuwamon B being attacked. Deal with Shamamon and Goburimon.

Then interact with the crane device to move the bridge. Cross it and go down a slope you'll find more trapped digimon.

Send Aegiomon through the vent and he will fight 2 Goburimon Solo. Then have him return.

Proceed west, destroying barrels as you go when you reach the wall turn south and destroy more barrels to reveal a chest, the chest has an ACU attachment.

![](/ffaq/40/92/)

Continue on the path west until you reach a bulkhead and another device, open the bulkhead, then go inside and destroy the rubble burying the little digimon.

Keep going south and then west. You reach an open area, look to the north and remove the rubble. You will find Ebemon here, despite how he looks he is here to sell stuff. HOWEVER, opposite Ebemon is an Outer Dungeon!

##### Speed is Victory 1

Same deal as before but your racing Lalamon. The course is different from before (it's much easier than 2).

The digimon reward is Lalamon. The crystal message requirement is the same, clear without being hit by any obstacles or digimon.

Anyway back to Factorial Area.

Go south of Ebemon and destroy the barrels, proceed south (west path) crossing the bridge to reach a Kapurimon.

Send Aegiomon through again, there is a fork in the vent send him south first this will lead to a chest, the chest has a Revive Skill Disk.

![](/ffaq/40/93/)

Now go to the objective, Aegiomon will need to fight 2 Guardromon solo.

Return to Kapurimon and speak to him to get another battery for the bridge device.

Go back north and use the bridge device to move the bridge. Then go across.

You will find multiple digimon in need of help, go east first, destroy the rubble on the way to the digimon. Defeat Tankmon and Mechanorimon.

Then go back to the central area and go south and defeat the Goburimon and Shamamon attacking the door. Then break the door open.

Lastly, send Aegiomon through the vent, you will reach Nanimon's butt, push him several times till he is out. Nanimon also gives us a valuable item called Immortal Egg for later.

Then in this next area you will find 3 chests, they contain Medical Spray DX, HP Capsule II and Noise Guard.

![](/ffaq/40/94/)

Now bring Aegiomon back and open the last bulkhead. Go through to the next area.

#### Factorial Town 2

Go south and you'll find a chest next to an entrance to the theater. The chest contains, Training Set (Club) A

![](/ffaq/40/95/)

Now go south and take the elevator up to meet back up with Kokuwamon A.

Speak to him and then go back down the elevator and make your way North west and approach the device.

Prepare for a boss fight, you will need Virus type allies, bring allies with high int and a focus on Magic attacks.  
Plant magic skills are recommended.

##### UltimateBrachiomon

This is a Mega level, Data type enemy. He is weak to Plant attacks and Wind attacks.

He starts the fight immune to physical and vulnerable to magic attacks.

This will be a tough fight if you are unprepared.

When he goes below 50% HP he will switch to being strong against magic and vulnerable to physical.

After the fight go down the body to the Core of the area.

When you arrive approach the door. There is now going to be another boss fight.

For this upcoming boss prepare every type of digimon.

##### Vulcanusmon

He won't fight directly at first we need to destroy the two arms. One is a Vaccine type and the other is Virus type.

One arm will taunt while the other attacks.

Some skills require both arms to be present so destroy one before focusing on the other.

Luckily they don't have that much HP so they can be destroyed pretty quickly.

Once both are down a scene will play and he will call 4 more arms.

2 are Vaccine and 2 are Virus.

As before focus on one arm at a time he will be more aggressive attacking with each arm and at the end when he has used all of them, so use healing sprays if necessary.

When you have destroyed the 4 arms he will open his hatch to analyze your digimon before making more arms.

Use this opening to attack his main body (Data type), use Virus digimon to deal as much damage as you can, destroy his break point gauge before he gains enough CP.

He will bring out 4 arms again shortly after and repeat the loop.

The next time he opens the hatch use Cross Arts: Strike to finish him (if you have it) otherwise just do as you did before.

#### Factorial Town Clean up

After the boss go up the elevator that opened up.

You'll be brought back to the top, also various aspects of the area have changed now.

First go up to the platform to the north (we aren't going to leave yet so don't speak to Guardromon).

There is a card shop here now.

You can also card battle MetalMamemon.

Then go south and take the elevator down to the lower part of Factorial Town.

Here you can card battle Armadillomon. You can also enter the Factorial area and there are no enemies, but nothing else to be found (I think).

Go back down to where Vulcanusmon is and he will have opened a blacksmith shop. Unlike Zudomon's this one is digivolution items.

He will crease using materials and skill, Digieggs for Armor Evolution or DigiSpirits for Spirit Evolutions.

I used specific naming but in practice there are certain evolutions that are locked until you gain the items he will create in this shop.

Spirit Digimon can swap between a human and beast form (they have a combined form which is similar to Ultimate level if you have both spirit types).

Armor Digimon are their own sub type and are therefore outside the normal evolution line, an armor digimon cannot evolve further into anything else. Most will be around Champion level in strength where as some like those using the Digi eggs of Miracles or Destiny (which you likely cannot create yet) are on par with Ultimate or Mega.

 **Note: Digi-Jewels can be found from material collection points in Factorial Area**

Most of the items you need for forging can be bought from the theater or other shops.......with the exception of 2 which can only be bought in the human world which i warned you about.

Now go up to the platform and speak to Guardromon and choose to go to Central Town.

You will be brought back to Central Town after the scenes, you can also now go back and forth between the two areas as you want.

In Central town Zudomon can now make better Training Items but they are EXPENSIVE both in terms of materials and cost.

You also have a new side quest.

##### From Pegasusmon to the World

Pegasusmon wants you get Digi Eggs for Armor evolution (From Vulcanusmon). First he wants the egg of Sincerity

You have to go get them made and come back (or if you have it already just tell him), don't worry the egg isn't used up.

The quest is completed now and you are given the reward.

You can still give him more Digieggs outside the quest, by choosing the 3rd choice (It seems to be mistranslated).

After that he wants Light, Friendship and Courage, give each of them one by one.

Once you give him all 3 he'll give a SPD Attachment III.

ALSO, if you speak to the new Armor Digimon NPCs in town those digimon will join you thats instantly 4 new digimon for FREEEEE!

When you are ready to leave board the train to go to Guardian Palace.

Once you arrive this mission is complete.

## Walkthrough

### Chapter 8: Song of the Abyss

#### Audience with an Oracle

There is a card shop here.

When you arrive you will get 4 new side quests to do. So for now we'll focus on those.

##### The Craftman's Partner, Quick to Fight, Quick on the Job and Back to the Skies

Go back to Central Town and speak to Zudomon.

Then go to Factorial Town. (Birdramon Fast travel has been made available here).

There is a Guardromon near Blimpmon, speak to him. In essence to complete Zudomon's request we need to help Guardromon first.

You will then fight LoaderLeomon. He is a Vaccine type so Data Digimon are effective. It's an easy fight.

Guardromon's request is complete.

Speak to Andromon next to Blimpmon, then speak to Guardromon ask for help with Blimpmon.

Report back to Andromon and then speak to Blimpmon and we're done.

Now speak to Guardromon again for help with Zudomon's hammer.

Then report back to Zudomon and we're done.

Repairing Blimpmon has caused new items to pop up in every shop.

##### The Trial

Find Solarmon downtown in Central Town and speak to him.

Then find him again on top of the Central Tower (north end).

Now search the area for a Parrotmon Plume, there are a lot of fakes shining on the ground, the real on is part way up near the stairs where the enemy Solarmon is ironically.

Grab it and report back, and we're done.

Remember to spend you Agent points.

Then return to Junomon's temple and go inside.

Make your way through the elaborate hallway and to the Throne Room.

After the scenes you will have 2 more side quests before we can go to the Abyss Area.

##### PlatinumNumemon's Jewelry

Return to Central Town and speak to Big Bearmon.

Then enter the sewers and make your way down until you reach the objective in the east room.

Defeat 3 Geremon. After this hilarious failure go to the tavern and speak to Deputymon. You will then be returned to the sewers.

DO NOT ADVANCE, TURN AROUND!!!!

![](/ffaq/40/96/)

Attack it before it runs off.

Platinum Numemon is immune to electricity and has high defense to most things, however it has low magic defense.   
Despite being a Mega Level its pretty easy to beat.

Then when talking to Bearmon, if you say you'll trade it he'll give you Aura in exchange for the jewelry.

##### I want to go Someplace Legendary!

Go to Central Town entrace and find Coronamon.

Then go to the Factorial Area. Go down to the village and speak to Vademon.

Vademon will sell a Cooler....for 10 million yen.......

Luckily, we can haggle, keep telling him it's too much until he brings the price down to 1000 yen. Heh sucker!

You'll automatically return to Blimpmon, give him the cooler and he and Coronamon will be off on their training trip.

This side quest is now done.

On that note, you should now have enough Anomaly points to reach Agent Rank 5, meaning you can evolve mons into Ultimate (or Ultimate adjacent) level.

Once you're done no doubt going through several digimon evolutions it's time to head to the Abyss Area.

#### Abyss Beach

When you arrive there is a chest immediately to your left. It contains an Aquamarine

![](/ffaq/40/97/)

There is a Penmon you can card battle and a card shop next to him.

Make your way to the objective then instead of going south, go north west all the way up and then south till you reach a cliff with a chest.  
This chest contains HP Augment Chip II.

![](/ffaq/40/99/)

Return to the fork and go towards the objective for a scene.

You can access the skill disk and accessory shops here too (different stock from others). Ignore the objective for now go west until you reach the water.

You can swim in the water, go directly north you will find a chest AND an Outer Dungeon!  
The chest contains an Aqua Guard.

![](/ffaq/40/100/)

##### Time Attack Boss Battle 2

The rules are the same as the first 2 versions of this rule set. Reach the end and beat the boss.

There is a chest in the middle of the area containing Multi Boost alpha. Another chest has ACU Attachment II.

The boss and reward digimon is Ikkakumon. To unlock the message crystal you need to defeat 10 enemies with one hit.

When ready go to the objective in Abyss Beach and speak to Shaujinmon.

#### Abyss Surface

Digimon Found  
---  
ShellNumemon| Syakomon  
Penmon|   
Crabmon|   
Coelamon|   
  
Turn right upon entry to find a chest at the end of the cliff, it contains Training Set Classroom A.

![](/ffaq/40/101/)

Then proceed north following the other path before you reach the next fork you'll find a chest on the left wall, this contains a Full Revival Spray.

![](/ffaq/40/102/)

The path will fork a bit at this point, continue south east until there is a path leading north.

Go north all the way until the path forks again, go east to reach a chest on an island, this chest contains DEF Augment Chip II.

![](/ffaq/40/103/)

Now go west all the way until just after Mojyamon, walk on the north (right) side of the path so you go down a slope and find an Octomon, you can challenge him to a Card Battle.

Behind Octomon is a cave go inside and go north to find a chest which contains, Curse Attachment I.

![](/ffaq/40/104/)

Make your way back to the first fork near the objective and proceed south towards the large open space on the bottom of the map.

When you reach a Mojyamon you'll find a chest opposite him, this chest contains an Attach Attachment II.

![](/ffaq/40/105/)

Now make your way back to the fork to the fork leading to Shellmon's house and look opposite Octomon for a chest, this contains Ignition Flare II.

![](/ffaq/40/106/)

Then make your to Shellmon's house.

After that go to the objective south until you reach the cove, Mojyamon will inform you that to get Coveweed you need to get it from a Syakomon by swimming around the water.

Swim in the water and approach Syakomons and defeat them until you get the Coveweed. Then report back to Shellmon.

Then make your way back to the village to find Kamemon.

You can find Kamemon at the below spot.

![](/ffaq/40/107/)

To get her down use a DigiAttack.

And then after the scene make your way back to Shellmon.

After the scenes leave Shellmon's house.

Approach Octomon for a scene, then return to Shellmon's house again for more scenes.

Then leave the house, Divermon will join as a guest, then as you are leaving you will run into Dragomon and other Divermon.

You will then fight them, their ultimate level so it's best to have a full party of ultimates by now.

After that you may notice certain paths have been blocked off.

To reach the objective we need to take the long way by going back to the village and enter Abyss Surface from another entrance.

Once you reach the objective defeat the 3 Divermon.

Then use the conch to call Whamon.

#### Abyss Depths

Digimon Found  
---  
Coelamon| Crebmon  
Poyomon| Dragomon  
Gomamon| Octomon  
Seadramon| Penmon  
  
You can destroy some coral using DigiAttack down here.

In any case follow the path and you'll have to swim through a hall, then continue on the path south.

When you reach the objective a short scene will play, then south at this fork is a chest, the chest contains SPI Augment II.

![](/ffaq/40/108/)

Continue south through another swimming hall, there will be a path going west you can't use right now so continue south, until you reach a Dragomon blocking the way.

Then look south for a chest, this one has an HP Augment Chip II.

![](/ffaq/40/108/)

Then go to the objective for a scene, then walk up to the objective and choose to wait for Divermon.

You will then fight 2 groups of enemies and Submarimon will join the party.

With him along you can move through the water halls with strong currents.

Make your north through 2 such halls, then go north WEST to reach an Octomon and a chest, this chest has a Status Barrier Disk.

![](/ffaq/40/110/)

Make your way to the objective and prepare for a boss fight. Bring Vaccine types for the boss and at least 1 Virus type for the Divermons, also be sure to have Cross Art: Strike equipped.

##### Sharkmon

He is a Virus type digimon, and is weak to electricity. Use Vaccine types or those with Electric moves to be as effective as possible.

Defeat the 2 Divermon quickly, as they will become a pain.

When he has taken almost 50% damage he will enter a charging stance. At this point the Divermons if still there will heal the boss and use Taunt skills to make you unable to target the boss.

Use AOE skills in this case that target the whole group. If you are unable to stop him from reaching 3 CP then guard.

With a team of ultimates this will be only slightly tough due to his Divermons getting in the way.

You will then return to the surface, after the scene go towards the village.

After the scenes we will be brought back to Junomon's temple.

Make your way to speak to Junomon and this mission will be completed.

## Walkthrough

### Chapter 9: The Gear Forest

#### The World Tree's Cry

Before we head out we have a few new side quests to handle. One of these is another DLC Costume quest.

First go to the Abyss area. The Abyss area village area now has a Syakomon in the north west end for you to card battle.

##### Proper Beach Attire (DLC)

Speak to Wanyamon and then put on the Swimwear DLC costume, (everyone needs to put it on).

Speak to Wanyamon and then you'll have to fight Seadramon, followed by another fight with both WaruSeadramon and MegaSeadramon.

Finally you will have a boss fight against MetalSeadramon, even though he is a mega level he is super weak.

##### The Color the Water Speaks Of

Speak to the Kamemon still in the destroyed village.

Check the right side of Shellmon's house to find her diary.

Then swim around the water, pick up the purple plant (you can pick up others but they don't matter).

Then return to Kamemon and answer "Blue for True"

This will complete the quest. Now return to Central Town.

##### A Missing Friend

Speak to Motimon near the train station, he is with Agumon and Gabumon.

Go back to the Abyss Area and go to the objective, where you'll have a boss fight against Scorpiomon.

That said Omnimon is here to back us up again so this will be an easy fight.

##### Impatience and Determination

Speak to Lunamon and Blimpmon. Time to get that heater next.

To find it use the ladder next to Mushroomon's food store and go up, then go up another ladder. You'll find the heater in the house to the east.

Or at least you would but it's been stolen. Speak to Betamon and he'll point at Goblimon as the thief.

Now go Downtown, you'll find there are a bunch of Goblimon here. Look for the group of 3 Goblimon to find the one that stole the heater.

Then report back to Blimpmon and we're done.

Also it SHOULD be possible for you to beat Time Attack Boss Battle 3 Outer Dungeon now (thought the message requirement might be hard).

##### Time Attack Boss Battle 3

This one consists of primarily Vaccine and Data enemies in the maze itself with the boss being the Virus MetalTyrannomon.

All of the enemies are pretty meaty even with a party of ultimates, I advise having Cross Art: Strike equipped.

Having one digimon of each type is best, and try to avoid battles if you can.

Alternatively a full party of Virus types with one that has Character Reverse, to reverse any Vaccine types.

You still cannot complete the bonus objective very likely and even beating this one will take some effort, so feel free to come back when you feel more confident.

##### Fight the Ultimate Digimon 1 and 3

By now you should be capable of defeating the mega level digimon in both the Ultimate Digimon outer dungeons. Assuming you have level 20s to 30s Ultimate levels with decent stats.

Now onwards to the Gear Forest.

#### Gear Forest: Floating Island Plains

Digimon Found  
---  
Muchomon| Sunflowmon| Deramon  
Tentomon| Unimon|   
Kabuterimon| Gekomon|   
Pabumon| Flymon|   
  
Make your way south after getting off the train and follow the path until you reach a scene.

Then defeat the group of Goblimon. Then check the south east of here for a chest, this one has CRT Attachment I.

![](/ffaq/40/111/)

Now have Palmon swing you across the gap. There will be a fork in the path and the place is very maze like.

Proceed north west for now destroying rubble along the way once you reach the end of the path there is a chest guarded by Flymon and Gekomon. This chest contains the Burst Flame II Skill Disk.

![](/ffaq/40/112/)

Go back to the fork and go north east upstairs. There will be another fork.

The south fork is just a dead end so go north and destroy the rubble. There will be a short scene.

Then instead of proceeding, go east to find a ladder and go up, you'll find a chest up here, the chest has an INT Augment II.

![](/ffaq/40/113/)

Next go east and analyze the vines and use a mon with a Fire digiAttack to burn away the vines. Then swing across.

Do this again to swing across one more time to reach a lone island with another chest, this chest has a SPD Augment Chip II.

![](/ffaq/40/114/)

Go back to the fork before the ladder, and burn the vines and continue north west.

Then go across to the west again you'll find one more chest guarded by Flymons. The chest contains a Plant Guard.

![](/ffaq/40/115/)

Then go back and jump across to the east instead you'll find another chest immediately, this one contains Panic Wall I.

![](/ffaq/40/116/)

Now make your way north to the next area while destroying rubble.

#### Shaded Woods

Digimon Found  
---  
Muchomon| Sunflowmon| Deramon  
Tentomon| Unimon| Woodmon  
Kabuterimon| Gekomon|   
Pabumon| Flymon|   
  
Once you arrive there will be a scene, then look to the right to see a chest, this chest has a Magma Fall II Skill Disk.

![](/ffaq/40/117/)

To your west are a long barriers shaped like Woodmon, with about 3 real Woodmons hidden among them, DigiAttack your way through.

Once past all three barriers check north there are some thin wood like vines blocking a chest, use a digiattack and grab the chest.   
The chest contains a Full Revival Spray.

![](/ffaq/40/118/)

Now go up the slope west and you run into more barriers.

Destroy all the barriers and hidden Woodmon and proceed north up another slope.

Then destroy some barriers and look north west to see some vines, burn them and swing across with Palmon to find a chest, this chest contains an SP Augment Chip II.

![](/ffaq/40/119/)

Go back and continue east until you reach the end of the branch and burn the vines above to swing across.

From here continue east up the slope, when you reach solid ground there will be a fork, go east and use the vines to get across south.

Then go west all the way till you reach more vines to burn and go across.

You'll find a chest here, this one has an Attacker Attachment.

![](/ffaq/40/120/)

Now return back to the fork and go north instead.

After coming north go north east to find some vines you can burn and go acorss, defeat the Flymon and burn the vines to the north west.

Go across to reach 2 chests, they contain Dark Guard and SPI Augment Chip II.

![](/ffaq/40/121/)

Return back again and go north west and turn left to find a chest on the edge of a gear, the chest has a Int Augment Chip II.

![](/ffaq/40/122/)

Continue north and then you'll have a battle against Kuwagamon, Shamamon and Goblimon.

Then go west and you'll find more vines, go across and you'll find a chest containing SP Augment Chip II.

![](/ffaq/40/123/)

Then go south west across more vines, then you'll find another chest, this one has a Revival Capsule DX.

![](/ffaq/40/124/)

Then go south across another set of vines, then south west for more vines.

You'll arrive on a higher elevation near the start of the area, there is a chest and an Outer Dungeon here. The chest contains a Feather Attachment.

![](/ffaq/40/125/)

##### Fight the Ultimate Digimon 2

Same deal as the last two version, the reward digimon is Andromon and the condition for crystal message is 20 Marks of mastery (which if you fought all the mons in previous versions of this challenge you already have).

Below is the route info.

1st Choice| Route 1| Route 2  
---|---|---  
Rookie| Syakomon  
(Virus)| Lalamon  
(Data)  
2nd Choice| Route 3| Route 4| Route 5| Route 6  
Champion| Gatomon  
(Vaccine)| Bakemon  
(Virus)| Guardromon (Gold)  
(Free)| Raptordramon  
(Vaccine)  
3rd Choice| Route 7| Route 8| Route 9| Route 10| Route 11| Route 12| Route 13| Route 14  
Ultimate/Mega| Shakkoumon  
(Free)| Piedmon  
(Mega)| 

Dragomon  
(Virus)

| Andromon  
(Vaccine)| Pandamon  
(Data)| ExTyrannomon  
(Vaccine)| Zudomon  
(Vaccine)| Vademon  
(Virus)  
  
When done leave the Outer Dungeon and return all the way back to the north east and take the north exit to the next area.

#### Gear Forest Village

Lots to do here too. First go towards the shops and go into the tree door next to them, you'll come out above the tree house. Here you'll find Tanemon who you can Card Battle and a chest. The chest contains a Guarder Attachment.

![](/ffaq/40/126/)

There is a card shop on the west side of the village, next to the card shop there is a slop that goes up into the tree houses, go up here and go west across a bridge, then west from there is a chest behind Lilamon and Lilymon.

The chest contains SPD Augment Chip II.

![](/ffaq/40/127/)

Then go down the ramp and go west again to find a Kiwimon you can Card Battle and north of Kiwimon is an Outer Dungeon!

##### Protect the Giant Digimeat 1

Same gig as before in almost everyway the arena is a bit different. The message completion requires beating without being forced into a battle and the digimon reward is Wizardmon.

The digimon this time are MudFrigimon, Gaomon, Biyomon, Dorimon and Aquilamon.

None of them are particularly fast so it's pretty easy.

Lastly go to the north east end of the village to find a Floramon you can Card battle, and in the corner a chest. The chest has an X Heal Skill Disk.

![](/ffaq/40/128/)

Now approach the top middle of the village and speak to Bachusmon.

Take the north exit out of the village after the scenes.

#### Deep Woods

You can't use the map here and there's fog......goody.

Walk down the slope and as you try follow the objective you'll notice there is no path forwards and the path behind you has vanished. Furthermore this big tree keeps looking at you. Keep going around in circles until Operator calls you. Then Analyze and DigiAttack the tree.

It's Cherrymon. This will be a mini boss of sorts. He is a Virus type and is weak to fire.

Then you can proceed to the World Tree.

#### Sanctuary

Here you'll battle 2 Kuwagamon and an Okuwamon. Even if you defeat the 2 Kuwagamon more enemies will appear to replace them.

Okuwamon has a lot of HP and is almost a boss in terms of HP amount. He will give himself more moves and such but is pretty much a normal enemy otherwise.

After the scene we're done with most things in the area, but some side quests have opened up.

From the village take the right exit out of the village.

#### Shade Tree Pier

Digimon Found  
---  
Sunflowmon| MegaKabuterimon  
Unimon| Woodmon  
Flymon| Muchomon  
  
Before we do any side quests let's get the chests and other things done. Go down the slope at the start and near the bottom straight ahead is a chest, it contains Vigor Attachment I.

![](/ffaq/40/129/)

Then go to the east end of the area to swing across some vines and find a MegaKabuterimon, defeat it and you'll find an Outer Dungeon!

##### Time Attack Boss Battle 4

The last of these you'll run into. This one has primarily bug digimon and will end with a boss which is a mega level.

You are free to attempt this one but you very likely will not be able to win with a group of ultimates below level 50.

Go back follow the path south and then west, when you reach the west end you can find a chest, it has a revival capsule.

![](/ffaq/40/130/)

Proceed west and go down the slope. Then go north swing across a gap for a chest, this chest contains Multi-Recovery DX.

![](/ffaq/40/131/)

Go back and move south and then south west to find a chest behind a group of Muchomon, it contains Sleep Attack

![](/ffaq/40/132/)

Go slightly north and swing across to the east until you reach another chest, this one has a Sleep Wall I

![](/ffaq/40/133/)

Go back and then continue east to another swing point, swing to the middle gear platform for another chest, this one has an HP Casule II.

![](/ffaq/40/134/)

Now return to the beginning of this area near Birdramon and speak to Muchomon for the quest.

##### Secret of the Hidden Honey Base

Our goal is to destroy the beehives, this quest will cause Funbeemons and other bee digimon to appear as enemies in the area.

Find the structures that look like this and destroy them with DigiAttacks.

![](/ffaq/40/135/)

The more you destroy the more bee digimon will spawn. Once all are destroyed report back to Muchomon.

Once the quest is done make your way down and out of the area via the south exit.

#### Gear Forest: Floating Rock Islands

Digimon Found  
---  
Muchomon| Tentomon  
Floramon|   
Deramon|   
Gekomon|   
  
Take the path south east down a slope to a cliff, you'll find a chest there it contains Revival Capsule DX.

![](/ffaq/40/136/)

Go back up the slope to the starting area and take the south west across a large branch.

Then proceed south again across a branch, you will find a chest in the south west corner, this one has a Soul Attachment.

![](/ffaq/40/137/)

Go east and swing across a vine and then follow the path to a ladder. Go up the ladder.
