You'll find an entrance the Theater and Birdramon up here, there is a chest to the left of Birdramon. The chest has an HP Capsule III.

![](/ffaq/40/138/)

Make your way back down, north and then west continuing on the path towards the west exit to this area.

##### Floating Island Plains 2

You will find yourself back here, clear the rubble and the path is open connecting the areas. Nothing new here we can leave now.

Once you arrive at the station a scene will play. Some new side quests will open up.

##### The Mighty Bearmon Brothers

The Bearmon bros will appear at the Locomon station in Gear Forest so just speak to them.

Then speak to Little Bearmon on his own. You wil lthen fight a Minotaurumon.

Make your way through the Shaded woods to where Big Bearmon is. Defeat Greymon.

The quest is then completed.

##### Divermon's Woes

For this quest make your way to the Abyss Area, specifically Abyss Depths.

Speak to Divermon at the entrance, go further in for a scene and Submarimon will rejoin you.

After a scene you will fight a Crabmon, and then the mission will be completed.

With that we are done. You are free to do any further prep before going to Guardin Palace.

 **THIS IS ANOTHER POINT OF NO RETURN!!!!**

 **Do everything you want in the digital world before proceeding.**

## Walkthrough

### Chapter 10: Shinjuku Crisis

#### Attack on Junomon's Temple

After the scenes the train is under attack. Run across the train using DigiAttack to clear the path and attack digimon.  
If any digimon touches you it will be a game over and you have to restart. Reach the train and hit GranKuwagamon with a DigiAttack to knock him off the train.  
Note: Digimon in this segment don't count towards conversion.

You will then have a minor fight against GranKuwagamon, after the first round or so the fight will be ended regardless.

The area will be temporarily filled with bug type digimon.

Enter the temple for more scenes.

You will then have a short fight against the Ogremon gang from before. Their much easier this time, however after a few rounds they will buff themselves up before going on the attack again (however if you defeat 1 or 2 of them they will stay dead during the 2nd phase).

#### Shinjuku: Under Attack

Digimon Found  
---  
Divermon| Okuwamon  
Goblimon| Dragomon  
Kuwagamon|   
Kabuterimon|   
  
We're back in the real world, but our access to areas is limited. Aegiomon will have evolved to Aegiochusmon.

There will be digimon roaming the streets of the city.

Take the north exit until you reach a group of Special Forces soldiers, speak to one.

Then after a scene enter the underground station and follow the objective until to the next area until a scene plays.

##### Reaching the 1st Generator

Take the north exit after.

Make your way through Kabukicho to the back alley and then to the north east dead end to find the first generator.

After the scene head into the Underground waterway from the sewer drain nearby.

##### Reaching the 2nd Generator

Once inside the sewer the normal pathways will be blocked, go east from the entrance and in the rectangular room go south to find a hole in the wall, you can Aegiochusmon through.

As Aegiochusmon run through the sewer and reach the SDF soldiers nearby. Defeat Dragonmon and 2 Kurisarimon.

Then go lower the water level using the control panel (like back when we were chasing Coo). Then as yourself go to the generator.

##### Reaching the 3rd Generator

After the scene go to the east door and open and take the east exit to the Resevoir.

From the resevoir take the south west exit, to enter the South Block.

Make your way to the objective (passing by a lot of digimon corpses), you'll soon reach the final generator.

Shiroki needs a tool to repair the generator so head back to the Resevoir and take the south exit.

Make your up to the Marunonaka line upstairs portion and speak to the marked soldier.

Then speak to the agent to get the tool and you will be brought back to the South block.

Fight your way back to Shiroki, and then defeat 2 Coredramon (Green).

After a few more scenes go to the objective to reach Shinjuku Park and speak to Simmons.

Make your way to the Tokyo Metropolitan Government Building for a scene and then a boss fight.

Prepare Vaccine type digimon of around level 30, also have Cross Art Strike equipped.

##### Titamon + SkullBaluchimon

These 2 digimon are classified as one. They count as a Virus type so Vaccine types will be effective. This boss can attack 3 times per turn  
and generates CP super fast. As the fight progresses this will become 4.

They also have the Deity Trait which means Aegiochusmon will do more damage to it with Bolt Break Knockdown.

After a few turns a scene will play. 

Then after you deal nearly 50% damage another scene will occur. Then again after more damage is dealt.

Titamon will use it's special move at this point and injure the entire party to prevent healing.

Note: The fight can be ended with Cross Art: Strike after he goes below 50%.

More scenes will play as you lower his HP and eventually defeat him.

You will then have the true boss fight of this area.

##### Titamon (Berserk)

Type wise nothing has changed.

AT THE START OF THE BATTLE HAVE EVERYONE GUARD.

Titamon will use his charge stance but the power of Chronomon lets him skip the waiting period and he attacks immediately.

Use items to recover or revive any allies that took a bad hit afterward.

He will attack normally and then soon use it again. Operator will inform you to use the MiniEmp device from Dr. Simmons.

Use the item from the menu. Attack normally until his next turn and a scene will play.

His next charged stance attack is interupted. However he will gain a lot of CP and ALL STATS WILL BE BUFFED.

Furthermore the next time he enters his charged stance he can be broken normally.

Note: **IF you did enough damage before this phase you may be able to beat him without needing to break him.**

The mission will come to an end shortly thereafter.

## Walkthrough

### Intermission: Hosts

#### The In-Between Theater

We'll regain control in the theater with no one around.

Make your way to the door in the north east of the room we couldn't enter before.

After a scene with Homeros, King Drasil (Yggdrasil) and Kunlun you will receive the Crimson Dragon Data Fragment.

For those unaware, these 3 primarily King Drasil has appeared as the ruler, manager, or "Host Computer" of the digital world in many other pieces of media and usually having become an antagonist trying to delete the digital world, reboot it or the same to the human world.

## Walkthrough

### Chapter 11: Future is Present

#### Re: Time Stranger, Shinjuku Vision Square

We're back in Shinjuku 8 years in the future, or the present day.......well sort of this is still before the events of the prologue.  
Furthermore some things seem to be different, as even the public knows about digimon.

Aegiomon can now equip the Crimson Dragon Data Fragment to evolve into Aegiochusmon before battle (he can also evolve during battle).

Bad news though, there will be new chests in this version of Shinjuku.

Go around the crowd to the east and find the chest next to trash cans, this chest contains HP Augment Chip II.

![](/ffaq/40/139/)

We can't explore too freely yet so take the north exit.

#### Koshu-Kaido Intersection

Proceed north until you reach the street and then west to find the chest next to a phone booth, the chest contains a Talent Awakening Booster DX.

![](/ffaq/40/140/)

Continue north and go to the north east corner of the map next to the bikes to find a chest, this chest contains ATK Augmentation Chip II.  
Take the north exit to Kabukicho.

![](/ffaq/40/141/)

#### Kabukicho-Theater Square

Go to the open space in front of the arcade, you will find a chest in front of one of the lion dog statues. This chest contains SPD Augment Chip II.

![](/ffaq/40/142/)

Then go west to find another chest to the north between some trash cans and vending machines, this chest has a Friendship.

![](/ffaq/40/143/)

Continue north for a scene and you will enter A Certain Back Alley.

You can't fully explore this area head to the objective and you will be back in the Misono Residence.

Some lengthy scenes will now play.

#### Special Forces Underground Base

You'll regain control here and can walk through the area to the exit. Make note of the giant machine to the south.

Once you reach the end attack the vent and climb up.

After the scenes proceed to the end of the tunnel.

#### Rebellion Village

Make your way into town for a scnee.

After the scenes you can explore a bit before proceeding.

Just west and a bit north from the entrance is a chest, it contains a Light Guard.

![](/ffaq/40/146/)

There is another chest in the north of town next to a Togemon. This chest contains SPD Augment Chip III.

![](/ffaq/40/144/)

Go to the skill disk and accessory shop in the north west end (up a ladder) to the left of the shops is another chest, this one has an Attacker Attachment II.

![](/ffaq/40/145/)

You can also challenge SuperStarmon near the entrance to the village to a card battle.

When ready to proceed go towards the objective.

After speaking to Simmons take the north exit to meet with Merukimon.

Return to the village and speak to Simmons and Shiroki before examining the gate to the Digital World.

## Walkthrough

### Chapter 12: The Red Sea of Tragedy

#### Central Town - Present Day

You will pop back up in the underground tunnels, make your way to the end and go up the ladder.

Most of the shops here are the same as in Rebellion Villages, despite the more Virus-y shop keeps, however the blacksmith is replaced by a material shop where you can change materials into different types! Super useful if your missing some types.

All Card Shops throughout the digital world will now have new cards.

Inside the house near the shops is Dark SuperStarmon who you can card battle.

Go to downtown, you can enter the Sewers which have different now stronger enemies as listed below:

Digimon Found  
---  
Deltamon| Kurisarimon  
Arukenimon| SkullMeramon  
Dokugumon| Parrotmon  
Otamon|   
  
If you make it to the bottom you get an HP Capsule I from the digimon there, nothing else.

The Theater also now has new items in its shop.

When ready to proceed go to the tavern.

After the scenes you will be brought to the Abyss Area.

#### Abyss Area: Present Day

You can get one MasterBlimpmon to come and go as you want.

On the far east of the village you can find an Otamon to card battle.

North of MasterBlimpmon is a ladder, go up the ladder and then up another ladder, this will lead to a dead end, destroy the rubble with a DigiAttack and enter the cave.

You will come out on the other side where you'll find an Outer Dungeon.

##### Speed is Victory 3

Oh good this again.

The reward digimon is a Windramon and the message crystal clear condition is to clear without hitting and obstacle.

This may seem frustrating but it's just a matter of a bit of practice I cleared this condition on my 2nd attempt.

When ready to proceed go to Abyss Surface.

Digimon Found  
---  
Raremon  
Sukamon  
  
Make your way to Shellmon's house.

After the scenes go outside and speak to Shellmon to visit the Abyss Sanctuary.

#### Abyss Sanctuary: Present Day

Digimon Found  
---  
MegaSeadramon| Plesiomon  
Scorpiomon|   
Gizamon|   
Zudomon|   
  
Make your way to the right and Submarimon will join you.

Unlike the surface the depths are pretty different so there will be chests and new enemies etc.

Make your north and then when you reach a fork go south east through a wall tunnel and you'll reach a chest, this chest contains Power Energy II Skill Disk.

![](/ffaq/40/147/)

Go back to the fork and go north and then destroy the rubble to the north and the path will lead to another chest.

![](/ffaq/40/148/)

Return south and then proceed east and you'll find a Zudomon, defeat it and face south, destroy the rubble to reveal another chest.  
This one contains an Atk Augment Chip II.

![](/ffaq/40/149/)

Continue east till you reach a fork, ignore the north path for later.

Go east and stop a short way in near a Gizamon/Scorpiomon duo and break the wall to the north east, to reveal a chest, this one contains a Medical Spray.

![](/ffaq/40/150/)

Keep going east until reaching another fork, then go south across more water currents.

Follow the path west to find 2 chests and an Outer Dungeon.   
The chests contain a Full Revival Spray and an SPI Augment Chip II.

![](/ffaq/40/151/)

##### Survive to the End 3

Been a while since we did one of these hmm, you know the drill by now. To clear survive till the end and get the bonus message crystal by surviving without incurring an enemy preemptive attack.

The digimon this time are Crabmon, WaruSeadramon, Shellmon, Gekomon and Sharkmon.

Beware: WaruSeadramon circle the arena's outside and can reach you that way if you hole up in one spot.

Your reward digimon this time is Whamon.

Unlike the previous version it might be possible to defeat many digimon without needing to fight and one shot them with DigiAttacks.

Furthermore it might even be possible to defeat them all before the time runs out, if your party is leveled around 30s and are ultimates.

At this point in time this trial will be very easy.

Return to the Abyss Depths and back to the fork and go north.

After going slightly north turn left and destroy the wall to reveal a chest, this one contains Spirit Bind.

![](/ffaq/40/152/)

If you go further in you'll see something funny.

Now go back west to the fork neat the north exit and go north.

JUST SLIGHTLY north and turn right to see a chest on the east wall, this one contains an HP Augment Chip II.

![](/ffaq/40/153/)

Continue north and then when you reach a group of confused panicking digimon, on the north end of the room is a chest containing a Holy Light II Skill disc.

![](/ffaq/40/154/)

Then prepare for a boss equip your mons with magic skills especially Aegiomon, ideally you should be using Vaccine types with light magic skills. However be sure to have physical skills ready as well.

Move east for a scene and then a boss.

##### SkullSeadramon

The boss's state will be determined by which part of it's body is visible. This boss is very weak to Light skills.  
This boss gets a lot of turns throughout the battle and builds CP quickly.

At the start the boss (while showing it's spine) will always reflect all Physical attacks, so magic is best used now, during this phase it will use a lot of AOE spells to attack.

After enough turns pass, it will change to a different body part, such as it's tail.

While it's tail is out it no longer reflects physical and reflects magic instead. During this phase it will use debuffs and single target spells.

Once enough CP is built up it will move on to it's whisker, during this phase all of it's stats are buffed but it will have no reflects.  
It will start using AOE magic once more.

By now it will have built up 4 or 5 CP and after a few turns will switch over to it's head to begin charging.

During this phase weaken it's resistance to Lightning with Aegiochusmon's Lightning Pile move and lower it's Spirit if you can with other moves. To prepare for the next phase.

While it is charging it has no reflects, and fewer buffs take advantage of this change to deal a lot of damage, you have only 1 turn before it finishes charging.

If you fail to defeat it before it is charged GUARD IMMEDIATELY.

After a charging attack it will repeat the last few phase until the next time uses a charging attack.

Once the boss is defeated go south to find a chest, this one contains a Multi Wall.

![](/ffaq/40/155/)

Now go north to the next area.

#### Throne Room

There is a Pukumon who you can card battle here.

Go north up the slope and stop before Scorpiomon, there is a chest to the left, this one contains an SP Augment Chip II

![](/ffaq/40/156/)

Continue up the slope till you reach Vikemon, you'll find a chest to the right of him, this one contains a Medical Spray DX.

![](/ffaq/40/157/)

Then continue up the slope to find another chest on the right just a bit before the throne next to red coral.  
This one contains 3 Alexandrite.

![](/ffaq/40/158/)

Proceed to the throne for some scenes.

Then you'll be back at Shellmon's place, go inside and some lengthy scenes will play.

#### A Second Chance

After the scenes leave the Theater.

You will be back in the village, speak to the marked digimon.

Then go to speak to Venusmon.

There will then be some scenes and a sub boss fight.

##### Lanamon

Yup never trust this chick.

As a Spirit/Hybrid digimon she lacks any standard types. But she is weak to Lightning.

After the battle you will be back in the village, make your way to the objective.

You will be brought to the Throne room again, go meet with Neptunemon.

This will begin the true boss fight.

##### Calamaramon

Not a higher level but stronger still in her Beast form.

As before she has no type but is very weak to Lightning.

You have both Neptunemon and Venusmon on your side though so this fight will be many times easier.

Calamaramon will buff all her stats, so it is effective to debuff her or use skills which remove buffs.

You can also character reverse her to ensure Neptunemon can deal water damage (though this will remove the lightning weakness).

She will enter a charging stance after enough damage is dealt.

Overall not a hard fight at all thanks to our guest party members.

After that some scenes will play and you will obtain the Blue Steel Data Fragment.

## Walkthrough

### Chapter 13: Nothing Left To Protect

#### Return to Rebellion Village

Speak to Venusmon and then board MasterBlimpmon, and go to Central Town, there will be some scenes. Make your way to the tunnels and return to Rebellion Village.

Then after the scenes go to Merukimon.

After more scenes our next objective is set, but before that a new side quest is available.

##### Listen to the Voice

Make your way to the Abyss Sanctuary, specifically the prison area where we saw Sharkmon imprisoned.

You will find JumboGamemon in a cell (man did Kamemon make herself dumber?).

Then go to the throne room and speak to Neptunemon. Bring him back to the cell.

With that we're done here.

When ready to proceed use MasterBlimpmon to reach Gear Forest.

#### Gear Forest: Present Day, Floating Rock Islands

Digimon Found  
---  
Lalamon| CannonBeemon  
Floramon| Garudamon  
Kiwimon| Deramon  
Veggiemon| HerculesKabuterimon  
  
There are new enemies and chests here. Also now when using the vines to travel you have to pay 100 yen.........what is this Uber?

 **Note: Chests that have appeared here seem to have only minor recovery items and skill disks. So it isn't necessary to go after them unless you want to.**

In any case go down the ladder to the west and follow the path around swing across. You will reach an open space with Veggiemon and CannonBeemon.

Then go south to the wall you will find a chest containing, Sp Spray II.

![](/ffaq/40/159/)

Proceed on the path north and a scene will play you will enter battle and Gryphonmon will join.

You cannot fully explore the area right now, so make your north east and then north. Exit the area, AND THEN REENTER.

When you reenter you can fully explore the area. (If this still doesn't work go to the village and then return).

Go south of the north exit to find a vine, swing across to reach MegaKabuterimon and a chest, this contains an Int Augment Chip II.

![](/ffaq/40/165/)

Then go all the way to the west end of the area and go south to a vine point swing across and go east to reach a HerculesKabuterimon and a chest behind it, the chest has a Critical Break Skill Disk.

![](/ffaq/40/166/)

Now take the north exit to continue onwards.

#### Shade Tree Pier

Digimon Found  
---  
Lalamon| Lilamon| MegaKabuterimon  
Floramon| Etemon|   
Kiwimon| Birdramon|   
Veggiemon| HerculesKabuterimon|   
  
Continue north swinging across vines as needed.

Then when you reach a Lilamon go west to find a chest guarded by a HerculesKabuterimon. It has an SP Spray II.

![](/ffaq/40/160/)

Then swing across the vines twice to the south, to reach 2 more chests. These contain HP Spray II and Ripping Net Skill Disk.

![](/ffaq/40/161/)

Back track and go north, there will be another fork, you will find a chest to the left containing HP Capsule II.

![](/ffaq/40/162/)

Go up the slope, and make your way north east crossing a bridge, then swing across the vines to the north east of the area, to reach an outer dungeon from before, next to it are 2 more chests, they contain Attack Field and Poison Attack.

![](/ffaq/40/164/)

Then continue towards the village.

Once you arrive in the village watch the scenes and approach Bacchusmon's old resting spot. After more scenes we need to go to the Sanctuary.

But before that let's back track a bit for some chests real quick. Go back to Floating Rock Islands and take the west exit to reach the Island Plains.

#### Floating Island Plains (Present Day)

Digimon Found  
---  
Lalamon| Lilamon| MegaKabuterimon  
Floramon| Etemon|  ShogunGekomon  
Kiwimon| Birdramon| Gekomon   
Veggiemon| HerculesKabuterimon| Muchomon   
  
Swing across and you'll find a chest here, it contains a Defense Augment II.

![](/ffaq/40/167/)

Make your north west and then south across a vine, defeat ShogunGekomon and make your way down the slope towards where Locomon station was.

Here you'll find a bunch of escapee digimon, you can also card battle Sylphiemon here.

There is a Garudamon here behind it is a chest, it contains HP Spray II.

![](/ffaq/40/168/)

Now return up to the prior area and continue north to reach another ShogunGekomon. Behind him is a chest, this one contains a Destruction Attachment.

![](/ffaq/40/169/)

Make your way back near the beginning of this area and proceed north instead.

You'll reach another fork with a MegaKabuterimon. There is a chest here containing SP Capsule III.

![](/ffaq/40/170/)

Now go up the ladder to the east and swing across 2 sets of vines as you follow the path to an island with a chesta (and Deramon).  
The chest contains Aqua Pressure III.

![](/ffaq/40/171/)

Now return to the fork and go north west and swing across. Make your towards the north exit of this area and just before the exit is a HerculesKabuterimon and a chest, this chest contains 3 Emerald.

![](/ffaq/40/172/)

There shouldn't be anymore new chests the area to the north doesn't have any new chests (thankfully).

Make your way to the Sanctuary.

Enter the Deep woods and Cherrymon will force you into a battle and then immediately end it due to back pain.

Continue towards the Sanctuary to meet Bacchusmon. Then proceed to the theater for another Akashic Vision.

#### Saving Bacchusmon

You will be brought back to just slightly before we arrived in Gear forest at the same starting point. 

Make your way to where the injured digimon were and this time instead of Gryphonmon, Lotosmon will appear instead.

Lotusmon will have us reach the village from the west path, we already cleared out the chests so make your way to the village.

Once you do some scenes will play, make your way through the village as the digimon keep falling asleep.

##### The Dream world

Digimon Found  
---  
Phantomon  
Bakemon  
Tapirmon  
  
You will be moving in side scrolling fasion, continue through the area. You can still battle digimon here, mostly spooky kinds.

This space some door ways glowing yellow which will warp you to another door. The direction from where you enter determines where you end up. The trick is that the floor Bacchusmon is one has an invisible floor.

Below is a diagram for reaching for Bacchusmon.

![](/ffaq/40/173/)

  1. The first door will warp you to the upper platform
  2. Turn around and go through the door you came from
  3. You will be brought to the east most door, go back through it.
  4. You will to the east of Door 1, and Bacchusmon is to the east, the floor in front of you is hidden but you can walk on it to reach him.



After you find him he will disappear, continue east through the door and you will be brought to a different place than shown above,

You will now have a boss, equip all party members with Sleep Wall or anti status ailment skill, continue east for a scene and a boss fight.

##### Witchmon

She is a data type digimon so Virus types are efffective. She is weak to plant and earth attacks.

She isn't all that strong however she is fast and gets turns easily between your party, what makes her annoying is she puts your digimon to sleep and attacks, this ends up taking away your turns.

After she has amassed enough CP she will charge, this is the best time to deal damage as it is easy enough to break her at this point.

Not a hard fight.

Make your way to the Sanctuary and you will have another boss fight.

##### TyrantKabuterimon

This will be a bit tougher than the last fight. He is a virus type so Vaccine and Water element attacks are effective.  
This boss gets A LOT of turns throughout the battle 4 at the beginning and more as it proceeds.

Luckily Sirenmon and Bacchusmon are backing us up.

You can deal damage and fight him normally throughout the fight, there will be scenes with Sirenmon and Bacchusmon.  
At the end of these scenes Bacchusmon will enter a boosted form and gain a new skill which causes him to sleep, but Sirenmon will wake him.

The bosses special deals a lot of party wide damage but you can heal with items and skills if necessary.

Near the end of the battle it will buff itself immensely even increasing it's resistance to all elements and adding reflects for physical and magic attacks.

Once the battle is over you will get the Emerald Arbor Data Dragment. Allowing Aegiochusmon to access a new form.

Exit the theater for some scenes.

## Walkthrough

### Chapter 14: Brothers of Bygone Times

#### Returning to Rebellion Village

After the prior scenes speak to Bacchusmon, for some scenes.

You can now access the card shop in town and there is a lilymon up in the western tree house you can card battle. Furthermore north west of the area is also a Deramon you can Card Battle.

You can also now reach Rosemon at the Shaded Woods, to do this use the vines closest to the north exit to the village and jump 2 times.  
Then on the 2nd island move to the north west corner and burn the vine above to create a new path.

Swing across, you'll find a Sunflowmon who you can Card battle.

You can now swing over to Rosemon (it's just talking though).

With that done we have some new side quests.

##### Hidden Honey Base Strikes Back

Speak to Peckmon in the village.

Then go to the marked location and fight TigerVespamon.

This won't be a hard fight compared to the past few story bosses.

Then report back to Peckmon.

##### Message from Beyond Time

Speak to the 2 Drimogemon in front of MasterBlimpmon.

Then go after the little brother further into the area. You will then need to beat a Groundramon.

Now go north to the next area and find the big brother, defeat a WarGrowlmon this time.

Then return to the village and take the south exit to the shaded woods you'll find Drimogemon near the start.

Speak to him and watch the scenes as this side quest ends.

With that done return to Central Town, a Kokuwamon has appeared in Downtown (upper floor via stairs) who you can card battle.  
Also in the Sewers you will find a Keramon you can challenge to a card battle.  
Lastly, the tavern also has a Turiemon you can card battle.

Then return to Rebellion Village and speak to Merukimon. After the scenes return to the Digital world and go to the Factorial Area.

#### Factorial Area: Present Day

The area has changed quite a bit.

Make your way east and you'll encounter Guardromon (Gold), he will take over creating items that Vulcanusmon used to make.

Go furhter in to speak to Stingmon and ExVeemon, they will reveal the fate of the Bearmon Brothers.

After that we will be asked whether to go back directly to Rebellion or village or stay here for now. We are gonna stay here.

Make your way down to where the village was, by a few tickets or a perpetual pass from Vademon, go down the elevator and then down the slope, interact with the door to enter the "Kokuwamon hall".

You can wander through the area like you did before no enemies, just a lot of Kokuwamon stealing credit. Part way through is a Guardromon who you can card battle.

Make your way through then make your way to Vulcanusmon's room, you will find 2 chests on the east side of the room.  
They contain Physical Attachment II and Crit Attachment II.

![](/ffaq/40/174/)

When done make your way back to Rebellion Village and speak to Chuumon.

Then speak to Pegasusmon, he will bring you to Kabukicho.

#### Shinjuku Present Day

Before we worry about going to the arena we can finally explore Shinjuku again.

In Kabukicho you'll find a blonde girl in the south of the area you can Card battle.

Go to the Shopping District first. You will find a kid outside the Misono resident you can card battle him.

Next go the Back Alley, go north and you'll find a chest next to the vending machines, it contains Talent Awakening Booster DX.

![](/ffaq/40/175/)

Then go to the north west path and you'll find a chest next to a yellow crate, it contains an INT Augment Chip II.

![](/ffaq/40/176/)

Then go to Akihabara, go north while hugging the east wall until you reach a chest next to shome plants, it contains an INT Augment Chip II.

![](/ffaq/40/177/)

Further north is the skill disc store, buy some new ones if you need them.

Then next to it there is a retaraunt, with a chest outside containing an SPI Augment Chip II.

![](/ffaq/40/178/)

Before you leave here you can challenge the guy in the suit in the south west corner to a card battle.

Then go north to the alley. The card shop here has been updated so go buy any cards you may be missing.

East of the card shop is a chest containing an DEF Augment Chip II.

![](/ffaq/40/179/)

Go to the north most horizontal alley and near the vending machines you'll find another chest containing Friendship.

![](/ffaq/40/180/)

Now go to Vision Square to find a girl who you can Card battle.

Next make your way to Vision Square and go down to the Subroad, you'll find a chest on the west end next to the coin lockers.  
The chest contains Talent Awakening Booser DX.

![](/ffaq/40/181/)

Then go north till you pass a coffee shop (Tomnee cofee) and then turn to the west to find another chest containing HP Augment Chip II.

![](/ffaq/40/182/)

Go down to the Marunonaka Line and go to the south east corner to find a chest containing Def Augment Chip II.

![](/ffaq/40/185/)

Then goo north to the vending machine north of the stairs going to the platform to find a chest.  
The chest contains Friendship.

![](/ffaq/40/183/)

Go down the stairs to the platform to find a chest near the north most trashcans. The chest contains an SP Augment Chip II.

![](/ffaq/40/184/)

Go back up to the subroad and go to the Promenade.

Go to the west end you'll find one chest on the north side containing SPD Augment Chip II.

![](/ffaq/40/186/)

Then go south to find another chest containing a Talent Awakening Booser DX.

![](/ffaq/40/187/)

Then make your to the East Gate next, go north to the coffee shop to find a chest containing an SP Augment Chip II.

![](/ffaq/40/188/)

We're now done with the underground. Go to Vision Square and use a taxi to go to the Overbridge Intersection.

On the south west side, near the plants near the taxi is a chest, it contains an Atk Augment Chip II.

![](/ffaq/40/189/)

Then go north to find a chest in the tunnel next to a sign. The chest contains an SPI Augment Chip II.

![](/ffaq/40/190/)

Then go to the south east end again next to the taxi has a chest containing Friendship.

![](/ffaq/40/191/)

That should be all the chests in Shinjuku. Return to Kabukicho and enter the underground arena.

#### Shinjuku Underground Arena

Speak to PileVolcanomon and choose to enter. Then go to the waiting room.

There are no special rules, the enemies will have a bit more HP than normal and you won't gain EXP or Money or Scan from these fights.

The first round is against Chuumon and Platinum Sukamon.

The 2nd round is against 3 Phantomon.

The 3rd round is Crowmon and Taomon.

The 4th round is against PrinceMamemon, KingEtemon and SuperStarmon.

Then in the champsion match we at last face GrapLeomon, the former Little Bearmon.

After the scenes head over to Vision Square to meet with Hiruko.

Then speak to Birdramon to reach Pegasusmon and go back to Rebellion Village.

Return to the Digital World and the Factorial Area after that.

#### Paradise Coloseum

Head up to the Paradise Colliseum and some legnthy scenes will play.

When you regain control you will be back in the underground arena, make your way back to the Paradise Coloseum.

Speak to Tankmon and etner the arena proper.

In the arena you will find a Deputymon you can card battle and an Outer Dungeon!

##### Speed is Victory 4

This is the final race, and the reward for clearing it is MagnaGarurumon, which makes it the first Mega Level (Adjacent) digimon you can acquire.

This will be the hardest race to clear to unlock the message crystal as there are many obstacles and moving digimon.

You can clear it with some practice, but it will take you a bit, relax and don't get frustrated if you mess up.

This one took me about 30 minutes to an hour of practice to beat, it can be frustrating but what is important is learning the right time timing of when turn and move. Also sometimes its best to ignore the meat so you can move with more control rather than speed, even if you might be overtaken.

Go back to the Paradise Coloseum and speak to Volcanomon.

For theh first round you face Matadormon and Minotarumon.

The 2nd round, defeat Piedmon, SkullMammothmon and ShogunGekomon.

The 3rd round is against SkullMeramon.

For the next fight prepare vaccine digimon with electric and fire moves.

The 4th round is against a Lopmon and Terriermon....get ready though after this fight there will be a scene, you will have a boss fight.

##### Callismon

As expected he is a Virus type. He is very weak to Fire, and also weak to null damage, but resists Metal.

He has a variety of moves and gets quite a few turns at the start, worst still as you deal damage he gains new buffs becoming more dangerous, the lower his HP goes the more buffs he will add.

After he takes 50% damage he will start charging up. One quick way to be rid of his charging phase is to use Cross Art: Strike.

His weakpoint the arm, is immune to all elements except Plant and Lightning (which he is weak to)

This will not remove his buffs though.

After he his charge is broken and he goes below 50% HP a scene will play and Marsmon will join the battle.

The rest of the fight will go normally, but he will keep building buffs and becoming harders to deal with, eventually he will charge again, during this period he can be defeated before he charges fully.

Once the battle is over sit back and watch the end of this mission.

## Walkthrough

### Chapter 15:History Repeats Itself

#### Return to Rebellion Village

With our previous mission done, we can head back to Rebellion Village, before that we have 4 side quests.

##### How to Cheer Up a Warrior

This one will reward a special valuable called a Fragment of Memory, each which coresponds to one of the Olympos 12, and can be used to crease a special attachment in Factorial Area (Gold Guardromon).

First speak to Marsmon. Some scenes will play and after you will fight Marsmon yourself.

Some more scenes will play and the mission is completed. 

##### The Greatest OMNI Carnival

Time for another Tournament!

Speak to Volcamon to begin. Pick a team to face. More teams are added as you win.

The first 4 matches reward 10000 yen and HP and SP Capsule IIs

The 2nd 4 matches reward 25000 yen and Hp and SP Spray IIs

The 9th match is revealed after the other 8 are beaten. Beating it will earn 50000 Yen and the Omni Sword.

  1. Searching for Nanimon. Defeat Digitamamon and Botamon.
  2. King of Big Bad Bugs. Defeat Funbeemon, Tentomon and Snimon
  3. Monzaemon and Friends. Defeat Monzaemon, Unimon and SaberLeomon
  4. Lucky Number 100. Defeat SkullMeramon.
  5. Trustworthy Truth Tellers. Defeat Puppetmon, Lilymon and Whamon.
  6. Circus in the Red: No Misreckoning. Defeat Piedmon, BanchoLeomon and SkullMammothmon
  7. The Royal Flush. Defeat Platinum Sukamon and 2 Sukamon.
  8. Covert Honey Corps, Royal Commandos. 3 Tiger Vespamon.
  9. Imperialdramon: Paladin Mode



Don't worry about them seeming scary, due to the many mega levels they aren't very difficult.

The Side quest is no completed yet, there are still more opponents who will pop up as you advance the main story.

The remainder of our side quests are in the human world so return to Rebellion Village.

##### Stuck in the Restroom

Make your way to the Coffee Shop outside Kabukicho (where we met the Father of Shinjuku) and speak to the employee.

Anyway keep knocking on the door until the sorry sack inside starts talking. After talking to him for a bit leave the coffee shop.

After a scene this mission is done.

Next go to Vision Square.

##### In The Palm of an Unknown Hand (DLC Outfit)

This is another DLC Outfit quest.

Go to the spot and call Hiroko. Then put on the cyber sleuth outfit.

After the scene go nearby and check the marked spot. Watch the scenes and this mission will end.

Once you are done head back to Rebellion Village and speak to Merukimon.

Then go meet with Simmons, after the scene speak to her again to go to the lab.

This isn't a point of no return, don't worry.

#### Preventing Tragedy and Lost Friends

After the scenes, go north and speak to Chuumon.

Then make your way to the next objective, and then the next and then once more for some lengthy scenes.

Then leave the Theater.

You will return to Rebellion Village alone.

Go speak to Merukimon, a scene will play and we will lose contact with Operator.

After the scenes go through the gate to Central Town.

#### Battle for Central Town

Make your way out of the sewers and after a few scenes, fight your way through Central Town to the objective.

First you will fight Volcamon and then Breakdramon.

After defeating Breadramon go back to the previous area and use the ladder to go around, on the way you'll fight a Kimeramon.

Then make your way to the objective and you'll find Merukimon staring down an ominous digimon (Cherubimon).

You will then have a boss fight against VenomMyotismon

##### VenomMyotismon

A mega level Virus type. He is weak to Light and Lightning and resists Dark and Fire.

He isn't all that threatening, but gains more and more turns as the fight continues, furthermore many of his moves cause all kinds of ailments  
from crystalize, to sleep, to injury, to confuse, he will also buff his INT towards the half way point.

Not a hard fight but can be annoying due to his ailments.

When all is said and done Central town will be reclaimed.

Leave the theater and go speak to Merukimon in the Tavern. This will complete the mission and you'll also earn Merukimon's Fragment of Memory.

## Walkthrough

### Chapter 16: The Truth

#### Restored Central Town

With the town now back to normal all old NPCs have returned. The Skill Disk, Item and Blacksmith Shops all have new items.

Enter the house across from the food shop to find a Tsunomon you can Card Battle. There is a Falcomon outside "your" house you can card battle.

Enter your house to speak to Terriermon Assistant to get a Replica Researcher Badge.

Wendigomon's Material shop can now be found in the sewers, in the circular part near the middle on the way down.

Now for some side quests.

##### I Don't Belong Anywhere Yet

Go to the tavern and speak to Marine Angemon.

Head to the Abyss Area. And go to the Abyss Surface, you need to collect the water from the right place, go to the slope going down at the north west end of the map. You will find a collect spot here, this is the only collect spot not contaminated by Sukamon or Raremon.

Grab the sea water here and report back to MarineAngemon. Then go find MarineAngemon again near the entrance to town.

Then go back to the Abyss Area village and speak to MarineAngemon again to finish the quest.

For the next quest we need to go to the Back Alley in Shinkuku (the one near the shopping district).

##### The Easy Road is Best

Speak to Zubaeagermon. Then speak to him with any Digimon Pixel Art Shirt equipped.

Then go to Paradise Colosseum and speak to Duramon. A short scene will play and the mission is complete.

##### The Greatest OMNI Carnival Continued

With Grademon joining the Colosseum we can proceed with the carnival.

Go to Volcamon and choose The True Twentiest. Defeat Grademon.

We can't continue beyond this, but we'll get 50000 yen for the trouble.

When ready to proceed it's time to head to the Dark Field.

#### Dark Field: Dark Crevasse

Digimon Found  
---  
Kurisarimon  
Infermon  
SkullGreymon  
  
Follow the path and destroy the rubble to the west, you'll find a chest here, it contains DEF Augment Chip II.

![](/ffaq/40/192/)

Then continue north and speak to Gekomon.

He has a weird power which warps up to different points depending on which cheesy line we tell him.

The first choice you make doesn't affect or change where you end up your taken to the first island north of you.

Generally one choice leads to a correct path and another goes to a false one (they will be marked after the 2nd time onwards).

Walk up to the next platform and get it wrong on purpose, select "All friendships serve as an eternal bond."

You will be brought to the East end of the area, there are 2 chests here. They contain a Wind Guard and Crush Blade II Skill Disk.

![](/ffaq/40/193/)

Go up to the platform, we're going to get it wrong again to go back to the start, choose "Receving gratitude for one's effort is reward enough".

Then go up to the platform and get it wrong again, choose "True Evil does not exist in this world"

You will find a chest here too, it contains Attack Augment Chip III.

![](/ffaq/40/194/)

Walk up to the platform and choose "What goes around comes around". This is the correct answer.

Then in the next area go to the platform and choose "I'd like to be the umbrella that shields you from the rain"

Go to the last platform and choose "No good deed goes unrewarded!"

At the last one say "I want everyone to be happy".

#### Dark Castle

Digimon Found  
---  
Kurisarimon  
Infermon  
SkullGreymon  
  
This will be the same. More warping through these different islands.

Go to the platform and choose "All you need is love".

Make your way to the next platform and choose "We should all learn to give rather than take.", this is the wrong answer but is needed.

Go east and you will find a chest containing Magic Charge Skill Disk.

![](/ffaq/40/195/)

Opposite of the chest is an Outer Dungeon!

##### Protect the Giant DigiMeat 3

You know the drill.

This time the enemy group is Bakemon, Dobermon, Dracmon, Phantomon and SkullMammothmon.

Most of this is normal but the Bakemon will ignore you and fly HIGH up into the air and only start to lower when it nears the goal.  
Phantomon does this too but will notice you and approach you.

To deal with both wait at the south end where your goal is to wait for the Bakemon to lower down and hit them.

The reward is Orochimon, to get the message crystal just clear without entering a battle.

Go back out and to the platform, choose "If you wish for something hard enough, miracles will happen"

Go to the next platform and choose "It's okay to believe in the inherent goodness of people"

Then north you will find a chest, this one contains an INT Augment Chip III.

![](/ffaq/40/196/)

Then go to the platform and choose "The World is filled with beauty as are you".

This will lead to another chest, it contains Medical Spray DX.

![](/ffaq/40/197/)

Go to the platform and choose "Even if Life is Extinguished Love remains" this will bring us back on the "Correct path"

Go up to the platform again and choose "Life is about the journey and not the destination"....

On the next platform choose "Hard work is something meant to be enjoyed!"

There is a chest to the south here, it contains Panic Attack.

![](/ffaq/40/198/)

At the next platform choose "Everyone's happiness is my happiness"

Go up and choose "I live for love, not money" (Wrong answer)

Turn around to find a chest, this one contains EVA Attachment I.

![](/ffaq/40/199/)

Go to the platform and choose any answer, it will bring you back to the start.

Make your way back to the platform before this one and choose "If you believe in yourself others will too".

You will now be at the exit, nothing else here so take the stairs up.

#### Dark Garden

No enemies here, go up the stairs to where Birdramon is, to the left and right are two chests.   
They contain an SP augment chip III and Guarder Attachment II.

![](/ffaq/40/201/)![](/ffaq/40/200/)

Now proceed north, just before you reach the collapsed digimon turn right to the east to find another chest, this one contains an Attack Bind Skill disk.

![](/ffaq/40/202/)

Now prepare yourself for a boss fight.

You will want Vaccine digimon with light element skills.

When ready approach the door.

##### ZombiePlutomon

He is very weak to light but immune to dark. Light magic and vaccine digimon are very effective at draining his hp quickly.

He will primarily use AOE attacks, however he also has a move called Reaper's mist which prevents HP recovery (and drains MP). It is an effect you cannot remove in battle.

When he enters his charging stat he will have 4 mouths as possible weak points AND ALL OF THEM HAVE SEPARATE BREAK BARS.

However, even if you fully lower his HP the fight isn't over, a scene will play and you need to say another cringe line to Gekomon.

This fight can be very easy due to his heavy light weakness.

Once the fight ends some lengthy scenes will play.

#### Dark Crevasse 2

Digimon Found  
---  
Sangloupmon| SkullGreymon  
Crowmon| Infermon  
DemiDevimon|   
Myotismon|   
  
We're now back here again, but the digimon present are all different, furthermore certain chests which were opened before are now filled with items to collect........goody.

At the start near the platform is a chest containing SPD Augment Chip III.

![](/ffaq/40/203/)

Then go to the platform and pick any choice to summon Gekomon, beat him in a fight.

Now we can warp as usual.

Choose "I wish for the world to be showered with love"

Then choose "The world is more beautiful than you think".

In this next area defeat Myotismon and near the platform is a chest, it contains Deadly Attachment.

![](/ffaq/40/204/)

At the platform choose "I'd like to be the umbrella that shields you from the rain".

Then select "No good deed goes unrewarded!"

To the left of the next platform is a chest it contains X-Heal.

![](/ffaq/40/205/)

At the last one say "I never want to see anyone cry".

#### Dark Castle 2

Digimon Found  
---  
Sangloupmon| SkullGreymon  
Crowmon| Infermon  
DemiDevimon| Piedmon  
Myotismon|   
  
Go straight north to find a chest, this one has a Gaia Blaster II Skill Disk.

![](/ffaq/40/206/)

Now go to the platform and choose "All you need is love".

Here you will find a chest next to the following platform, it contains Soul Attachment II.

![](/ffaq/40/208/)

Go up to the platform again and choose "Life is about the journey and not the destination"....

On the next platform choose "Hard work is something meant to be enjoyed!"

You'll find another chest here it contains Multi Recovery DX. That's the last one we can finally move on.

![](/ffaq/40/209/)

Choose: "Everyone's happiness is my happiness" and then choose "If you believe in yourself, others will too".

Then go on up.to the Dark Garden.

To get past the guards choose "Don't let your dreams just be dreams! Just DO IT!"

Open the door up and many scenes will occur.

After those scenes leave the theater and speak to Merukimon.

This will complete the mission.

## Walkthrough

### Chapter 17: Foolish Humans

#### Mega Levels and Dark Field Clean Up

After completing the previous mission we now have enough Anomaly points to evolve digimon to the mega level.

Take some time evolve your party in preparation for the near end of the game.

This is also a good time to start filling in the field guide as you can fill in almost ALL of it, the only mons you cannot obtain are those that go beyond the Mega level into Mega +. These will require Rank 8 but some can require even Rank 10 and other requirements.

I advise you to trains your Mega level digimon as much as possible to the 50s in level and have decent stats.

Suffice to say we're not getting that done until much later.

Return to the Dark Field when your done and use Birdramon to go to the Dark Garden. Go down to the Dark Castle.

The Dark Castle area has now been repaired so you don't need to jump around, a card shop has also opened.

Near the north you can challenge Demi Devimon to a card battle, and to the south you can challenge SnowGoblimon to a card battle.

Go to the Crevasse from here and you can challenge Bakemon to a card battle as well.

##### Time Attack Boss Battle 3 and 4

With a team of mega levels if you train them up into the 20s or 30s you should be capable of beating both these trials now.

You can also likely obtain the message crystals this time.

TIP about DigiAttacks for the message:

DigiAttack is based on the following

  1. Type
  2. Element of the skill with the most power (Attachment skills are used only if they are more effective than the special skill)
  3. Attack or Int Stat depending on the type of attack (However there is a limiter where it doesn't affect it anymore)
  4. Level comparison between your digimon and enemy digimon



Level is more important if type and element are in your favor and you still cannot one shot a rookie, then increase your digimon's level by loading other digimon. For Time Attack 3 you need a digimon of at least level 50 to one shot Dracomons. and at least a level 40 Data for Agumon.

Time Attack 4 can be cleared with mega levels pretty easily to get Tyrant Kabuterimon as a reward.

To one shot enemies in Time Attack 4 the best target are Kabuterimon and Okuwamon.   
For Kabuterimon have a Data digimon of level 65 to 70 (might need more depending on strength of their skills).  
For Okuwamon a Virus or Vaccine around level 65 (or maybe lower).

Ultimately this will come down to level.

This should clear this series and unlock the message here.

##### Rebellion Village and the Lab

When ready to proceed with the story return to Rebellion Village.

Go to Merukimon's room and speak to Simmons.

Once ready to proceed go to the lab via the tunnel.

Once in the lab go through the hall to the elevator and enter.

#### Special Forces Underground Base: Research Division

Digimon Found  
---  
Datamon  
Hi-Andromon  
Ebemon  
Vademon  
MetalTyrannomon  
  
There will be digimon in here. You can't open any doors, go to the objective.

Enter the room and examine the terminal.

Then enter the room next door and examine the PCs.

You can now explore freely.

Go west to the room to the south. You will find a chest in here containing, SPI Augment Chip III.

![](/ffaq/40/210/)

Now go into the room in the north west corner of the lab, enter and go to the west end you'll find 2 PCs check the bottom one. Then there is a chest just nearby. It contains Guard Bind.

![](/ffaq/40/211/)

Now go east and then south to check the other large room.

You'll find a chest here near the east wall, it contains Revival Capsule DX.

![](/ffaq/40/212/)

Now check the PC on the south of the room for a scene. Now check the white board. At this point security will be beefed up Hi-Andromons spawning.

Go to the very first room you entered after separating from Simmon (the north middle one), there is a white board on the north end of the room examine it.

Ebemon will now spawn.

Go to the north west most room you'll find some papers on the table in the middle, read them and MetalTyrannomon will spawn, the ID however is on a new Ebemon that spawned.

Beat him for the ID.

Return to Simmons then.

You will then have to fight 3 waves of digimon of every type up till now.

Now enter the large gate to the south west.

In the Restricted area make your way to the objective and then open the door leading us to where Vulcanusmon is being kept.

Some scenes will play out.

Leave the room and enter the large room in the hall. Enter the Cargo Elevator and go up.

You'll find yourself in Akihabara.

After the scene go to the Misono Home Roof and speak to Pegasusmon. Choose to go to the government building.

After the scenes leave the theater. You will be returned to before you first entered the lab.

Make your way to Vulcanusmon.

Then make your escape as before. You will then have a boss.

##### Power Loader

Time to teach this piece of crap a lesson. He isn't a digimon, and is using a machine.

He also has no CP and has lower HP than a typical boss. Just lay into him.

Near the end he will use a stronger attack but it will cause him to be unable to act.

After some scenes leave the theater to return to Rebellion Village.

## Walkthrough

### Chapter 18: The Sun, The Moon and Juno

#### Cosmic Area: Cosmic Terminal

Speak to Simmons in Merukimon's room.

You'll be brought to MasterBlimpmon, next stop the Cosmic Area!

Go up and speak to the 2 digimon. After a scene talk to them again, then press the switch behind them and use the elevator to go up.

#### Heat Cosmic: Redflame Area

Digimon Found  
---  
Meramon  
Solarmon  
Meteormon  
  
There are flaming rocks blocking paths you cannot acces right now.

The path here is straightforward so just continue on through

#### Yellowflame Area

Digimon Found  
---  
Meramon| Volcamon  
Solarmon|   
Meteormon|   
RizeGreymon|   
  
Go west to the elevator, go down and then north to find a chest, it contains HP Augment Chip III.

![](/ffaq/40/213/)

Go west and you'll see a Volcamon with a chest near it, this one has a Magma Fall III.

![](/ffaq/40/214/)

Go north up a ladder and walk up the strange flame, interact with it to remove the barrier of flame and get a Heat Seed.

Continue north and then turn west for a chest it contains a Destruction Attachment II.

![](/ffaq/40/215/)

Go north and use the elevator. Then go north again for a chest containing an INT Augment Chip III.

![](/ffaq/40/216/)

Then continue on the path till you reach a ladder.

Go up and remove another heat seed.

Make your way towards the exit but the hot flames are blocking our path. Pumpkinmon suggests getting Chill Seed from Chill Cosmic and coming back.

For now go west and south to an elevator to go up.

Follow the path east to find a chest, it contains Revival Capsule DX.

![](/ffaq/40/217/)

Then go north to find another chest containing, Curse Barrier. Make note of the rocks behind the chest.

![](/ffaq/40/218/)

Now destroy the rocks behind the chest to find an Outer Dungeon!

##### Survive to the End 4

You know the drill here this is the last of this series.

The enemies here will be Solarmon, Meramon, Firamon, Flaremon and Megidramon.

Depending on your level, this time you may just be able to defeat all the enemies without issue as mega levels have more HP and SP.

The message crystal can be opened if you beat it without an enemy landing a preemptive attack.

The digimon prize is Phoenixmon.

Go back out.

Then go east and north to find another chest, this one contains Sleep Wall I.

![](/ffaq/40/219/)

Now go to the elevator. Proceed east, you will reach a fork, go north first to reach a chest, this one has a Wolkenapalm III.

![](/ffaq/40/220/)

Now go south to the elevator and we'll right back at the start.

Make your way back to the Cosmis Terminal and switch to Chill Cosmic.

#### Chill Cosmic: New Moon Area

Digimon Found  
---  
Mammothmon  
Coredramon (Blue)  
Frigimon

It contains an ATK Augment Chip III.

![](/ffaq/40/221/)

![](/ffaq/40/222/)

![](/ffaq/40/223/)

![](/ffaq/40/224/)

#### Crescent Moon Area

![](/ffaq/40/225/)

Now go west to the elevator to go up.

Go north east to find a chest, it contains Curse Attachment II.

![](/ffaq/40/226/)

Down here there are 2 elevators, before dealing with them go straight east to find a chest, this one contains a Speed Augment Chip III.

![](/ffaq/40/227/)

![](/ffaq/40/228/)

Take the north west elevator up, go north to find a chest it contains Energy Attachment I.

![](/ffaq/40/229/)

Then to the east you will find an Outer Dungeon!

##### Fight The Ultimate Digimon 4

This is the final one of these challenges. Whether you can handle it or not will depend on how much you have trained your digimon. A party of roughly level 40 to 60 Mega levels may be able to handle it.

Unlike prior versions of this trial there are no Rookie or Champions. All enemies here are either Ultimate Level or Mega Level, with a couple Mega+ level digimon thrown in too.

The digimon prize for clearing is Slayerdramon.

To open the message crystal you need 40 Marks of Mastery, if you fought all the digimon in the last 3 trials you'll unlock it immediately.

1st Choice| Route 1| Route 2  
---|---|---

(Vaccine)| Dorugreymon  
(Virus)

(Virus)| GreatGrizzlymon
